revision.comment: Auto generating page. date placed far in the past so it is attributed to Immanuelle and FireflyBot sends them messages if it is ever imported to Wikipedia.
revision.text: #redirect[[en:September 23 (lunar calendar)]] <noinclude>[[Category:New automatic wikipedia redirects]]</noinclude><includeonly>[[Category:Erroneous transclusions of September 23 (lunar calendar)]]</includeonly>

revision.comment: /* できごと */ 手取川の戦い
[[User:Addbot|ボット]]: 言語間リンク 3 件を[[Wikipedia:ウィキデータ|ウィキデータ]]上の [[d:q840365]] に転記
1 revision imported: importing jawiki history before translation, of all the 12 lunar months

revision.text:
{{旧暦9月}} '''旧暦9月23日'''は[[9月 (旧暦)|旧暦9月]]の23日目である。六曜は[[六曜#先勝|先勝]]である。
== できごと == * [[和銅]]5年（[[ユリウス暦]][[712年]][[10月27日]]） - [[越後国]]出羽郡を[[出羽国]]として分置 * [[貞治]]元年/[[正平 (日本)|正平]]17年（ユリウス暦[[1362年]][[10月11日]]） - [[北朝 (日本)|北朝]]が[[康安]]から貞治に[[改元]] * [[天正]]5年（[[ユリウス暦]][[1577年]][[11月3日]]） - [[手取川の戦い]]で[[上杉謙信]]が[[織田信長]]に大勝。 * [[明治]]4年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1871年]][[11月5日]]） - 弘前県が[[青森県]]に改称
== 誕生日 == * [[宝暦]]10年（グレゴリオ暦[[1760年]][[10月31日]]） - [[葛飾北斎]]、[[浮世絵]]師（+ [[1849年]]） * [[明治]]4年（グレゴリオ暦[[1871年]][[11月5日]]） - [[幸徳秋水]]、[[評論家]]・社会運動家（+ [[1911年]]）
== 忌日 == * [[寛政]]2年（グレゴリオ暦[[1790年]][[10月30日]]） - [[柄井川柳]]、[[川柳]]の祖（* [[1718年]]） * [[天保]]3年（グレゴリオ暦[[1832年]][[10月16日]]） - [[頼山陽]]、[[漢学者]]（* [[1780年]]）
== 記念日・年中行事 ==
== 関連項目 == {{旧暦360日|9|22|9|24|8|23|10|9|0923}}
[[Category:japanese lunar calendar]][[ja:9月23日 (旧暦)]][[Category:qq]]

{{Lunar September}} '''Lunar September23日'''は[[9月 (旧暦)|Lunar September]]の23日目である。六曜は[[六曜#先勝|先勝]]である。
== できごと == * [[和銅]]5年（[[ユリウス暦]][[712年]][[10月27日]]） - [[越後国]]出羽郡を[[出羽国]]として分置 * [[貞治]]元年/[[正平 (日本)|正平]]17年（ユリウス暦[[1362年]][[10月11日]]） - [[北朝 (日本)|北朝]]が[[康安]]から貞治に[[改元]] * [[天正]]5年（[[ユリウス暦]][[1577年]][[11月3日]]） - [[手取川の戦い]]で[[上杉謙信]]が[[織田信長]]に大勝。 * [[明治]]4年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1871年]][[11月5日]]） - 弘前県が[[青森県]]に改称
== 誕生日 == * [[宝暦]]10年（グレゴリオ暦[[1760年]][[10月31日]]） - [[葛飾北斎]]、[[浮世絵]]師（+ [[1849年]]） * [[明治]]4年（グレゴリオ暦[[1871年]][[11月5日]]） - [[幸徳秋水]]、[[評論家]]・社会運動家（+ [[1911年]]）
== 忌日 == * [[寛政]]2年（グレゴリオ暦[[1790年]][[10月30日]]） - [[柄井川柳]]、[[川柳]]の祖（* [[1718年]]） * [[天保]]3年（グレゴリオ暦[[1832年]][[10月16日]]） - [[頼山陽]]、[[漢学者]]（* [[1780年]]）

--> == Events == * [[和銅]]5年（[[ユリウス暦]][[712年]][[10月27日]]） - [[越後国]]出羽郡を[[出羽国]]として分置 * [[貞治]]元年/[[正平 (日本)|正平]]17年（ユリウス暦[[1362年]][[10月11日]]） - [[北朝 (日本)|北朝]]が[[康安]]から貞治に[[改元]] * [[天正]]5年（[[ユリウス暦]][[1577年]][[11月3日]]） - [[手取川の戦い]]で[[上杉謙信]]が[[織田信長]]に大勝。 * [[明治]]4年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1871年]][[11月5日]]） - 弘前県が[[青森県]]に改称
== Births == * [[宝暦]]10年（グレゴリオ暦[[1760年]][[10月31日]]） - [[葛飾北斎]]、[[浮世絵]]師（+ [[1849年]]） * [[明治]]4年（グレゴリオ暦[[1871年]][[11月5日]]） - [[幸徳秋水]]、[[評論家]]・社会運動家（+ [[1911年]]）
== Deaths == * [[寛政]]2年（グレゴリオ暦[[1790年]][[10月30日]]） - [[柄井川柳]]、[[川柳]]の祖（* [[1718年]]） * [[天保]]3年（グレゴリオ暦[[1832年]][[10月16日]]） - [[頼山陽]]、[[漢学者]]（* [[1780年]]）
== Commemorations ==
== See Also == {{旧暦360日|9|22|9|24|8|23|10|9|0923}}

revision.text:
[[sn:September 23 (Old Lunar Calendar)]][[ko:음력 9월 23일]] [[cdo:9 nguŏk 23 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:9月23日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 9월 23일]] [[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 23 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:九月廿三]] [[zh:九月廿三]] [[en:draft:September 23 (Old Lunar Calendar)]]{{Lunar September}} '''September 23''' is the 23rd day of month {{ill|September (Old Lunar Calendar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September}}, the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}}. Its Rokuyō is {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} and its day is {{ill|Senshō|ja|先勝}}.
== Events == * {{ill|Wadō|ja|和銅}}5年（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|712|ja|712}} {{ill|October 27|ja|10月27日}}） – The region of Echigo split the Dewa district off into a separate Dewa Province. * {{ill|Teiji|ja|貞治}}元年/{{ill|Shōhei|ja|正平}}17年（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1362|ja|1362}} {{ill|October 11|ja|10月11日}}） – The Northern Court changed its era name from {{ill|Kang'an|ja|康安}} to {{ill|Teiji|ja|貞治}}. * {{ill|Kansei|ja|寛政}}12年（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1800|ja|1800}} {{ill|December 7|ja|12月7日}}） – Inō Tadataka completed his survey of Ezo and the Ōshū Kaidō, then returned to Edo and presented his preliminary map to the shogunate. * {{ill|Ansei|ja|安政}}4年（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1857|ja|1857}} {{ill|December 7|ja|12月7日}}） – U.S. Consul {{ill|Townsend Harris|ja|ハリス}} visited Edo Castle and met with Tokugawa Iesada.
== Births == * {{ill|Genroku|ja|元禄}}15年（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1702|ja|1702}} {{ill|October 24|ja|10月24日}}） – {{ill|Yokoi Yayuu|ja|横井也有}}, a haiku poet († {{ill|1783|ja|1783}}). * {{ill|Hōreki|ja|宝暦}}10年（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1760|ja|1760}} {{ill|November 30|ja|11月30日}}） – {{ill|Kawaoka Seishū|ja|華岡青洲}}, a physician and pioneer of anesthesia († {{ill|1835|ja|1835}}). * {{ill|Bunka (era)|ja|文化 (元号)|lt=Bunka|lt_ja=文化}}14年（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1817|ja|1817}} {{ill|December 1|ja|12月1日}}） – {{ill|Ono Yūgorō|ja|小野友五郎}}, a mathematician († {{ill|1898|ja|1898}}). * {{ill|Kaei|ja|嘉永}}2年（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1849|ja|1849}} {{ill|December 7|ja|12月7日}}） – {{ill|Saionji Kinmochi|ja|西園寺公望}}, who served as Prime Minister on two occasions and as genrō († {{ill|1940|ja|1940}}). * {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治}}4年（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1871|ja|1871}} {{ill|December 5|ja|12月5日}}） – {{ill|Doi Bansui|ja|土井晩翠}}, a poet († {{ill|1952|ja|1952}}).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Tenshōjingo|ja|天平神護}}元年（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|765|ja|765}} {{ill|November 10|ja|11月10日}}） – Emperor {{ill|Junnin|ja|淳仁天皇}}, the 47th emperor. * {{ill|Kanbun|ja|寛文}}9年（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1669|ja|1669}} {{ill|November 16|ja|11月16日}}） – {{ill|Shakusha In|ja|シャクシャイン}}, the Ainu chief. * {{ill|Taihei Kōkoku|ja|太平興国}}元年（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|976|ja|976}} {{ill|November 14|ja|11月14日}}） – Emperor {{ill|Zhao Kuangyin|ja|趙匡胤}} (Taizu), the first emperor of the Northern Song (* {{ill|927|ja|927}}). * {{ill|Daiji (Japan)|ja|大治}}2年（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1127|ja|1127}} {{ill|November 25|ja|11月25日}}） – {{ill|Minamoto no Yoshimitsu|ja|源義光}}, a military commander and younger brother of {{ill|Minamoto no Yoshiie|ja|源義家}} (* {{ill|1045|ja|1045}}). * {{ill|Eikyō|ja|永享}}5年（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1433|ja|1433}} {{ill|December 1|ja|12月1日}}） – Emperor {{ill|Go-Komatsu|ja|後小松天皇}}, the 100th emperor of the Northern Court (* {{ill|1377|ja|1377}}). * {{ill|Ansei|ja|安政}}3年（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1856|ja|1856}} {{ill|November 17|ja|11月17日}}） – {{ill|Ninomiya Sontoku|ja|二宮尊徳}}, an agrarian reformer (* {{ill|1787|ja|1787}}).
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|10|22|10|24|9|23|11|10|1023}}

== Deaths == * {{ill|Tenshōjingo|ja|天平神護}}元年（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|765|ja|765}} {{ill|November 10|ja|11月10日}}） – Emperor {{ill|Junnin|ja|淳仁天皇}}, the 47th emperor. * {{ill|Kanbun|ja|寛文}}9年（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1669|ja|1669}} {{ill|November 16|ja|11月16日}}） – {{ill|Shakusha In|ja|シャクシャイン}}, the Ainu chief. * {{ill|Taihei Kōkoku|ja|太平興国}}元年（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|976|ja|976}} {{ill|November 14|ja|11月14日}}） – Emperor {{ill|Zhao Kuangyin|ja|趙匡胤}} (Taizu), the first emperor of the Northern Song (* {{ill|927|ja|927}}). * {{ill|Daiji (Japan)|ja|大治}}2年（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1127|ja|1127}} {{ill|November 25|ja|11月25日}}） – {{ill|Minamoto no Yoshimitsu|ja|源義光}}, a military commander and younger brother of {{ill|Minamoto no Yoshiie|ja|源義家}} (* {{ill|1045|ja|1045}}). * {{ill|Eikyō|ja|永享}}5年（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1433|ja|1433}} {{ill|December 1|ja|12月1日}}） – Emperor {{ill|Go-Komatsu|ja|後小松天皇}}, the 100th emperor of the Northern Court (* {{ill|1377|ja|1377}}). * {{ill|Ansei|ja|安政}}3年（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1856|ja|1856}} {{ill|November 17|ja|11月17日}}） – {{ill|Ninomiya Sontoku|ja|二宮尊徳}}, an agrarian reformer (* {{ill|1787|ja|1787}}).

[[sn:September 23 (Old Lunar Calendar)]][[ko:음력 9월 23일]] [[cdo:9 nguŏk 23 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:9月23日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 9월 23일]] [[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 23 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:九月廿三]] [[zh:九月廿三]] [[en:draft:September 23 (Old Lunar Calendar)]]{{Lunar September}} '''September 23''' is the 23rd day of month {{ill|September (Old Lunar Calendar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September}} the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}}. It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Senshō|ja|先勝}}.
== Events == * {{ill|Wadō|ja|和銅}}5年（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|712|ja|712}} {{ill|October 27|ja|10月27日}}） – The region of Echigo split the Dewa district off into a separate Dewa Province. * {{ill|Teiji|ja|貞治}}1st year/{{ill|Shōhei|ja|正平}}17年（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1362|ja|1362}} {{ill|October 11|ja|10月11日}}） – The Northern Court changed its era name from {{ill|Kang'an|ja|康安}} to {{ill|Teiji|ja|貞治}}. * {{ill|Kansei|ja|寛政}}12年（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1800|ja|1800}} {{ill|December 7|ja|12月7日}}） – Inō Tadataka completed his survey of Ezo and the Ōshū Kaidō, then returned to Edo and presented his preliminary map to the shogunate. * {{ill|Ansei|ja|安政}}4年（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1857|ja|1857}} {{ill|December 7|ja|12月7日}}） – U.S. Consul {{ill|Townsend Harris|ja|ハリス}} visited Edo Castle and met with Tokugawa Iesada.
== Births == * {{ill|Genroku|ja|元禄}}15年（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1702|ja|1702}} {{ill|October 24|ja|10月24日}}） – {{ill|Yokoi Yayuu|ja|横井也有}}, a haiku poet († {{ill|1783|ja|1783}}). * {{ill|Hōreki|ja|宝暦}}10年（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1760|ja|1760}} {{ill|November 30|ja|11月30日}}） – {{ill|Kawaoka Seishū|ja|華岡青洲}}, a physician and pioneer of anesthesia († {{ill|1835|ja|1835}}). * {{ill|Bunka (era)|ja|文化 (元号)|lt=Bunka|lt_ja=文化}}14年（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1817|ja|1817}} {{ill|December 1|ja|12月1日}}） – {{ill|Ono Yūgorō|ja|小野友五郎}}, a mathematician († {{ill|1898|ja|1898}}). * {{ill|Kaei|ja|嘉永}}2年（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1849|ja|1849}} {{ill|December 7|ja|12月7日}}） – {{ill|Saionji Kinmochi|ja|西園寺公望}}, who served as Prime Minister on two occasions and as genrō († {{ill|1940|ja|1940}}). * {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治}}4年（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1871|ja|1871}} {{ill|December 5|ja|12月5日}}） – {{ill|Doi Bansui|ja|土井晩翠}}, a poet († {{ill|1952|ja|1952}}).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Tenshōjingo|ja|天平神護}}1st year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|765|ja|765}} {{ill|November 10|ja|11月10日}}） – Emperor {{ill|Junnin|ja|淳仁天皇}}, the 47th emperor. * {{ill|Kanbun|ja|寛文}}9年（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1669|ja|1669}} {{ill|November 16|ja|11月16日}}） – {{ill|Shakusha In|ja|シャクシャイン}}, the Ainu chief. * {{ill|Taihei Kōkoku|ja|太平興国}}1st year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|976|ja|976}} {{ill|November 14|ja|11月14日}}） – Emperor {{ill|Zhao Kuangyin|ja|趙匡胤}} (Taizu), the first emperor of the Northern Song (* {{ill|927|ja|927}}). * {{ill|Daiji (Japan)|ja|大治}}2年（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1127|ja|1127}} {{ill|November 25|ja|11月25日}}） – {{ill|Minamoto no Yoshimitsu|ja|源義光}}, a military commander and younger brother of {{ill|Minamoto no Yoshiie|ja|源義家}} (* {{ill|1045|ja|1045}}). * {{ill|Eikyō|ja|永享}}5年（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1433|ja|1433}} {{ill|December 1|ja|12月1日}}） – Emperor {{ill|Go-Komatsu|ja|後小松天皇}}, the 100th emperor of the Northern Court (* {{ill|1377|ja|1377}}). * {{ill|Ansei|ja|安政}}3年（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1856|ja|1856}} {{ill|November 17|ja|11月17日}}） – {{ill|Ninomiya Sontoku|ja|二宮尊徳}}, an agrarian reformer (* {{ill|1787|ja|1787}}).
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|9|22|9|24|8|23|10|9|0923}}

It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Senshō|ja|先勝}}.

== Events == * {{ill|Wadō|ja|和銅}}5年（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|712|ja|712}} {{ill|October 27|ja|10月27日}}） – The region of Echigo split the Dewa district off into a separate Dewa Province. * {{ill|Teiji|ja|貞治}}1st year/{{ill|Shōhei|ja|正平}}17年（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1362|ja|1362}} {{ill|October 11|ja|10月11日}}） – The Northern Court changed its era name from {{ill|Kang'an|ja|康安}} to {{ill|Teiji|ja|貞治}}. * {{ill|Kansei|ja|寛政}}12nd year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1800|ja|1800}} {{ill|December 7|ja|12月7日}}） – Inō Tadataka completed his survey of Ezo and the Ōshū Kaidō, then returned to Edo and presented his preliminary map to the shogunate. * {{ill|Ansei|ja|安政}}4年（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1857|ja|1857}} {{ill|December 7|ja|12月7日}}） – U.S. Consul {{ill|Townsend Harris|ja|ハリス}} visited Edo Castle and met with Tokugawa Iesada.

== Deaths == * {{ill|Tenshōjingo|ja|天平神護}}1st year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|765|ja|765}} {{ill|November 10|ja|11月10日}}） – Emperor {{ill|Junnin|ja|淳仁天皇}}, the 47th emperor. * {{ill|Kanbun|ja|寛文}}9年（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1669|ja|1669}} {{ill|November 16|ja|11月16日}}） – {{ill|Shakusha In|ja|シャクシャイン}}, the Ainu chief. * {{ill|Taihei Kōkoku|ja|太平興国}}1st year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|976|ja|976}} {{ill|November 14|ja|11月14日}}） – Emperor {{ill|Zhao Kuangyin|ja|趙匡胤}} (Taizu), the first emperor of the Northern Song (* {{ill|927|ja|927}}). * {{ill|Daiji (Japan)|ja|大治}}2nd year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1127|ja|1127}} {{ill|November 25|ja|11月25日}}） – {{ill|Minamoto no Yoshimitsu|ja|源義光}}, a military commander and younger brother of {{ill|Minamoto no Yoshiie|ja|源義家}} (* {{ill|1045|ja|1045}}). * {{ill|Eikyō|ja|永享}}5年（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1433|ja|1433}} {{ill|December 1|ja|12月1日}}） – Emperor {{ill|Go-Komatsu|ja|後小松天皇}}, the 100th emperor of the Northern Court (* {{ill|1377|ja|1377}}). * {{ill|Ansei|ja|安政}}3rd year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1856|ja|1856}} {{ill|November 17|ja|11月17日}}） – {{ill|Ninomiya Sontoku|ja|二宮尊徳}}, an agrarian reformer (* {{ill|1787|ja|1787}}).

== Events == * {{ill|Wadō|ja|和銅}}5th year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|712|ja|712}} {{ill|October 27|ja|10月27日}}） – The region of Echigo split the Dewa district off into a separate Dewa Province. * {{ill|Teiji|ja|貞治}}1st year/{{ill|Shōhei|ja|正平}}17th year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1362|ja|1362}} {{ill|October 11|ja|10月11日}}） – The Northern Court changed its era name from {{ill|Kang'an|ja|康安}} to {{ill|Teiji|ja|貞治}}. * {{ill|Kansei|ja|寛政}}12nd year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1800|ja|1800}} {{ill|December 7|ja|12月7日}}） – Inō Tadataka completed his survey of Ezo and the Ōshū Kaidō, then returned to Edo and presented his preliminary map to the shogunate. * {{ill|Ansei|ja|安政}}4th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1857|ja|1857}} {{ill|December 7|ja|12月7日}}） – U.S. Consul {{ill|Townsend Harris|ja|ハリス}} visited Edo Castle and met with Tokugawa Iesada.
== Births == * {{ill|Genroku|ja|元禄}}15th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1702|ja|1702}} {{ill|October 24|ja|10月24日}}） – {{ill|Yokoi Yayuu|ja|横井也有}}, a haiku poet († {{ill|1783|ja|1783}}). * {{ill|Hōreki|ja|宝暦}}10年（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1760|ja|1760}} {{ill|November 30|ja|11月30日}}） – {{ill|Kawaoka Seishū|ja|華岡青洲}}, a physician and pioneer of anesthesia († {{ill|1835|ja|1835}}). * {{ill|Bunka (era)|ja|文化 (元号)|lt=Bunka|lt_ja=文化}}14th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1817|ja|1817}} {{ill|December 1|ja|12月1日}}） – {{ill|Ono Yūgorō|ja|小野友五郎}}, a mathematician († {{ill|1898|ja|1898}}). * {{ill|Kaei|ja|嘉永}}2nd year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1849|ja|1849}} {{ill|December 7|ja|12月7日}}） – {{ill|Saionji Kinmochi|ja|西園寺公望}}, who served as Prime Minister on two occasions and as genrō († {{ill|1940|ja|1940}}). * {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治}}4th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1871|ja|1871}} {{ill|December 5|ja|12月5日}}） – {{ill|Doi Bansui|ja|土井晩翠}}, a poet († {{ill|1952|ja|1952}}).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Tenshōjingo|ja|天平神護}}1st year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|765|ja|765}} {{ill|November 10|ja|11月10日}}） – Emperor {{ill|Junnin|ja|淳仁天皇}}, the 47th emperor. * {{ill|Kanbun|ja|寛文}}9年（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1669|ja|1669}} {{ill|November 16|ja|11月16日}}） – {{ill|Shakusha In|ja|シャクシャイン}}, the Ainu chief. * {{ill|Taihei Kōkoku|ja|太平興国}}1st year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|976|ja|976}} {{ill|November 14|ja|11月14日}}） – Emperor {{ill|Zhao Kuangyin|ja|趙匡胤}} (Taizu), the first emperor of the Northern Song (* {{ill|927|ja|927}}). * {{ill|Daiji (Japan)|ja|大治}}2nd year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1127|ja|1127}} {{ill|November 25|ja|11月25日}}） – {{ill|Minamoto no Yoshimitsu|ja|源義光}}, a military commander and younger brother of {{ill|Minamoto no Yoshiie|ja|源義家}} (* {{ill|1045|ja|1045}}). * {{ill|Eikyō|ja|永享}}5th year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1433|ja|1433}} {{ill|December 1|ja|12月1日}}） – Emperor {{ill|Go-Komatsu|ja|後小松天皇}}, the 100th emperor of the Northern Court (* {{ill|1377|ja|1377}}). * {{ill|Ansei|ja|安政}}3rd year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1856|ja|1856}} {{ill|November 17|ja|11月17日}}） – {{ill|Ninomiya Sontoku|ja|二宮尊徳}}, an agrarian reformer (* {{ill|1787|ja|1787}}).

[[sn:September 23 (Old Lunar Calendar)]][[ko:음력 9월 23일]] [[cdo:9 nguŏk 23 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:9月23日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 9월 23일]] [[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 23 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:九月廿三]] [[zh:九月廿三]] [[en:draft:September 23 (Old Lunar Calendar)]]{{Lunar September}} '''September 23''' is the 23rd day of month {{ill|September (Old Lunar Calendar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September}} the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}}. It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Senshō|ja|先勝}}.
== Events == * {{ill|Wadō|ja|和銅}}5th year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|712|ja|712}} {{ill|October 27|ja|10月27日}}） – The region of Echigo split the Dewa district off into a separate Dewa Province. * {{ill|Teiji|ja|貞治}}1st year/{{ill|Shōhei|ja|正平}}17th year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1362|ja|1362}} {{ill|October 11|ja|10月11日}}） – The Northern Court changed its era name from {{ill|Kang'an|ja|康安}} to {{ill|Teiji|ja|貞治}}. * {{ill|Kansei|ja|寛政}}12nd year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1800|ja|1800}} {{ill|December 7|ja|12月7日}}） – Inō Tadataka completed his survey of Ezo and the Ōshū Kaidō, then returned to Edo and presented his preliminary map to the shogunate. * {{ill|Ansei|ja|安政}}4th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1857|ja|1857}} {{ill|December 7|ja|12月7日}}） – U.S. Consul {{ill|Townsend Harris|ja|ハリス}} visited Edo Castle and met with Tokugawa Iesada.
== Births == * {{ill|Genroku|ja|元禄}}15th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1702|ja|1702}} {{ill|October 24|ja|10月24日}}） – {{ill|Yokoi Yayuu|ja|横井也有}}, a haiku poet († {{ill|1783|ja|1783}}). * {{ill|Hōreki|ja|宝暦}}10th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1760|ja|1760}} {{ill|November 30|ja|11月30日}}） – {{ill|Kawaoka Seishū|ja|華岡青洲}}, a physician and pioneer of anesthesia († {{ill|1835|ja|1835}}). * {{ill|Bunka (era)|ja|文化 (元号)|lt=Bunka|lt_ja=文化}}14th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1817|ja|1817}} {{ill|December 1|ja|12月1日}}） – {{ill|Ono Yūgorō|ja|小野友五郎}}, a mathematician († {{ill|1898|ja|1898}}). * {{ill|Kaei|ja|嘉永}}2nd year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1849|ja|1849}} {{ill|December 7|ja|12月7日}}） – {{ill|Saionji Kinmochi|ja|西園寺公望}}, who served as Prime Minister on two occasions and as genrō († {{ill|1940|ja|1940}}). * {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治}}4th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1871|ja|1871}} {{ill|December 5|ja|12月5日}}） – {{ill|Doi Bansui|ja|土井晩翠}}, a poet († {{ill|1952|ja|1952}}).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Tenshōjingo|ja|天平神護}}1st year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|765|ja|765}} {{ill|November 10|ja|11月10日}}） – Emperor {{ill|Junnin|ja|淳仁天皇}}, the 47th emperor. * {{ill|Kanbun|ja|寛文}}9th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1669|ja|1669}} {{ill|November 16|ja|11月16日}}） – {{ill|Shakusha In|ja|シャクシャイン}}, the Ainu chief. * {{ill|Taihei Kōkoku|ja|太平興国}}1st year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|976|ja|976}} {{ill|November 14|ja|11月14日}}） – Emperor {{ill|Zhao Kuangyin|ja|趙匡胤}} (Taizu), the first emperor of the Northern Song (* {{ill|927|ja|927}}). * {{ill|Daiji (Japan)|ja|大治}}2nd year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1127|ja|1127}} {{ill|November 25|ja|11月25日}}） – {{ill|Minamoto no Yoshimitsu|ja|源義光}}, a military commander and younger brother of {{ill|Minamoto no Yoshiie|ja|源義家}} (* {{ill|1045|ja|1045}}). * {{ill|Eikyō|ja|永享}}5th year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1433|ja|1433}} {{ill|December 1|ja|12月1日}}） – Emperor {{ill|Go-Komatsu|ja|後小松天皇}}, the 100th emperor of the Northern Court (* {{ill|1377|ja|1377}}). * {{ill|Ansei|ja|安政}}3rd year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1856|ja|1856}} {{ill|November 17|ja|11月17日}}） – {{ill|Ninomiya Sontoku|ja|二宮尊徳}}, an agrarian reformer (* {{ill|1787|ja|1787}}).

[[sn:September 23 (Old Lunar Calendar)]][[ko:음력 9월 23일]] [[cdo:9 nguŏk 23 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:9月23日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 9월 23일]] [[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 23 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:九月廿三]] [[zh:九月廿三]] [[en:draft:September 23 (Old Lunar Calendar)]]{{Lunar September}} '''September 23''' is the 23rd day of month {{ill|September (Old Lunar Calendar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September}} the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}}. It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Senshō|ja|先勝}}.
== Events == * {{ill|Wadō|ja|和銅}}5th year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|712|ja|712}} {{ill|October 27|ja|10月27日}}） – The region of Echigo split the Dewa district off into a separate Dewa Province. * {{ill|Teiji|ja|貞治}}1st year/{{ill|Shōhei|ja|正平}}17th year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1362|ja|1362}} {{ill|October 11|ja|10月11日}}） – The Northern Court changed its era name from {{ill|Kang'an|ja|康安}} to {{ill|Teiji|ja|貞治}}. * {{ill|Kansei|ja|寛政}}12nd year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1800|ja|1800}} {{ill|December 7|ja|12月7日}}） – Inō Tadataka completed his survey of Ezo and the Ōshū Kaidō, then returned to Edo and presented his preliminary map to the shogunate. * {{ill|Ansei|ja|安政}}4th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1857|ja|1857}} {{ill|December 7|ja|12月7日}}） – U.S. Consul {{ill|Townsend Harris|ja|ハリス}} visited Edo Castle and met with Tokugawa Iesada.
== Births == * {{ill|Genroku|ja|元禄}}15th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1702|ja|1702}} {{ill|October 24|ja|10月24日}}） – {{ill|Yokoi Yayuu|ja|横井也有}}, a haiku poet († {{ill|1783|ja|1783}}). * {{ill|Hōreki|ja|宝暦}}10th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1760|ja|1760}} {{ill|November 30|ja|11月30日}}） – {{ill|Kawaoka Seishū|ja|華岡青洲}}, a physician and pioneer of anesthesia († {{ill|1835|ja|1835}}). * {{ill|Bunka (era)|ja|文化 (元号)|lt=Bunka|lt_ja=文化}}14th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1817|ja|1817}} {{ill|December 1|ja|12月1日}}） – {{ill|Ono Yūgorō|ja|小野友五郎}}, a mathematician († {{ill|1898|ja|1898}}). * {{ill|Kaei|ja|嘉永}}2nd year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1849|ja|1849}} {{ill|December 7|ja|12月7日}}） – {{ill|Saionji Kinmochi|ja|西園寺公望}}, who served as Prime Minister on two occasions and as genrō († {{ill|1940|ja|1940}}). * {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治}}4th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1871|ja|1871}} {{ill|December 5|ja|12月5日}}） – {{ill|Doi Bansui|ja|土井晩翠}}, a poet († {{ill|1952|ja|1952}}).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Tenshōjingo|ja|天平神護}}1st year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|765|ja|765}} {{ill|November 10|ja|11月10日}}） – Emperor {{ill|Junnin|ja|淳仁天皇}}, the 47th emperor. * {{ill|Kanbun|ja|寛文}}9th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1669|ja|1669}} {{ill|November 16|ja|11月16日}}） – {{ill|Shakusha In|ja|シャクシャイン}}, the Ainu chief. * {{ill|Taihei Kōkoku|ja|太平興国}}1st year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|976|ja|976}} {{ill|November 14|ja|11月14日}}） – Emperor {{ill|Zhao Kuangyin|ja|趙匡胤}} (Taizu), the first emperor of the Northern Song (* {{ill|927|ja|927}}). * {{ill|Daiji (Japan)|ja|大治}}2nd year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1127|ja|1127}} {{ill|November 25|ja|11月25日}}） – {{ill|Minamoto no Yoshimitsu|ja|源義光}}, a military commander and younger brother of {{ill|Minamoto no Yoshiie|ja|源義家}} (* {{ill|1045|ja|1045}}). * {{ill|Eikyō|ja|永享}}5th year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1433|ja|1433}} {{ill|December 1|ja|12月1日}}） – Emperor {{ill|Go-Komatsu|ja|後小松天皇}}, the 100th emperor of the Northern Court (* {{ill|1377|ja|1377}}). * {{ill|Ansei|ja|安政}}3rd year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1856|ja|1856}} {{ill|November 17|ja|11月17日}}） – {{ill|Ninomiya Sontoku|ja|二宮尊徳}}, an agrarian reformer (* {{ill|1787|ja|1787}}).
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|9|22|9|24|8|23|10|9|0923}}

[[sn:September 23 (Old Lunar Calendar)]] [[ko:음력 9월 23일]] [[cdo:9 nguŏk 23 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:9月23日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 9월 23일]] [[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 23 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:九月廿三]] [[zh:九月廿三]] [[en:draft:September 23 (Old Lunar Calendar)]] {{Lunar September}} '''September 23''' is the 23rd day of month {{ill|September (Old Lunar Calendar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September}} the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Senshō|ja|先勝}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Wadō|ja|和銅}} 5th year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|712|ja|712}} {{ill|October 27|ja|10月27日}} ） – The region of Echigo split the Dewa district off into a separate Dewa Province. * {{ill|Teiji|ja|貞治}} 1st year/{{ill|Shōhei|ja|正平}} 17th year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1362|ja|1362}} {{ill|October 11|ja|10月11日}} ） – The Northern Court changed its era name from {{ill|Kang'an|ja|康安}} to {{ill|Teiji|ja|貞治}} . * {{ill|Kansei|ja|Kansei}} 12nd year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1800|ja|1800}} {{ill|December 7|ja|12月7日}} ） – Inō Tadataka completed his survey of Ezo and the Ōshū Kaidō, then returned to Edo and presented his preliminary map to the shogunate. * {{ill|Ansei|ja|安政}} 4th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1857|ja|1857}} {{ill|December 7|ja|12月7日}} ） – U.S. Consul {{ill|Townsend Harris|ja|ハリス}} visited Edo Castle and met with Tokugawa Iesada.
== Births == * {{ill|Genroku|ja|Genroku}} 15th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1702|ja|1702}} {{ill|October 24|ja|10月24日}} ） – {{ill|Yokoi Yayuu|ja|横井也有}} , a haiku poet († {{ill|1783|ja|1783}} ). * {{ill|Hōreki|ja|Hōreki}} 10th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1760|ja|1760}} {{ill|November 30|ja|11月30日}} ） – {{ill|Kawaoka Seishū|ja|華岡青洲}} , a physician and pioneer of anesthesia († {{ill|1835|ja|1835}} ). * {{ill|Bunka (era)|ja|文化 (元号)|lt=Bunka|lt_ja=文化}} 14th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1817|ja|1817}} {{ill|December 1|ja|12月1日}} ） – {{ill|Ono Yūgorō|ja|小野友五郎}} , a mathematician († {{ill|1898|ja|1898}} ). * {{ill|Kaei|ja|嘉永}} 2nd year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1849|ja|1849}} {{ill|December 7|ja|12月7日}} ） – {{ill|Saionji Kinmochi|ja|西園寺公望}} , who served as Prime Minister on two occasions and as genrō († {{ill|1940|ja|1940}} ). * {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治}} 4th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1871|ja|1871}} {{ill|December 5|ja|12月5日}} ） – {{ill|Doi Bansui|ja|土井晩翠}} , a poet († {{ill|1952|ja|1952}} ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Tenshōjingo|ja|Tenpyō神護}} 1st year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|765|ja|765}} {{ill|November 10|ja|11月10日}} ） – Emperor {{ill|Junnin|ja|淳仁天皇}} , the 47th emperor. * {{ill|Kanbun|ja|寛文}} 9th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1669|ja|1669}} {{ill|November 16|ja|11月16日}} ） – {{ill|Shakusha In|ja|シャクシャイン}} , the Ainu chief. * {{ill|Taihei Kōkoku|ja|太平興国}} 1st year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|976|ja|976}} {{ill|November 14|ja|11月14日}} ） – Emperor {{ill|Zhao Kuangyin|ja|趙匡胤}} (Taizu), the first emperor of the Northern Song (* {{ill|927|ja|927}} ). * {{ill|Daiji (Japan)|ja|大治}} 2nd year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1127|ja|1127}} {{ill|November 25|ja|11月25日}} ） – {{ill|Minamoto no Yoshimitsu|ja|源義光}} , a military commander and younger brother of {{ill|Minamoto no Yoshiie|ja|源義家}} (* {{ill|1045|ja|1045}} ). * {{ill|Eikyō|ja|永享}} 5th year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1433|ja|1433}} {{ill|December 1|ja|12月1日}} ） – Emperor {{ill|Go-Komatsu|ja|後小松天皇}} , the 100th emperor of the Northern Court (* {{ill|1377|ja|1377}} ). * {{ill|Ansei|ja|安政}} 3rd year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1856|ja|1856}} {{ill|November 17|ja|11月17日}} ） – {{ill|Ninomiya Sontoku|ja|二宮尊徳}} , an agrarian reformer (* {{ill|1787|ja|1787}} ).

== Deaths == * {{ill|Tenshōjingo|ja|Tenpyō神護}} 1st year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|765|ja|765}} {{ill|November 10|ja|11月10日}} ） – Emperor {{ill|Junnin|ja|淳仁天皇}} , the 47th emperor. * {{ill|Kanbun|ja|寛文}} 9th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1669|ja|1669}} {{ill|November 16|ja|11月16日}} ） – {{ill|Shakusha In|ja|シャクシャイン}} , the Ainu chief. * {{ill|Taihei Kōkoku|ja|太平興国}} 1st year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|976|ja|976}} {{ill|November 14|ja|11月14日}} ） – Emperor {{ill|Zhao Kuangyin|ja|趙匡胤}} (Taizu), the first emperor of the Northern Song (* {{ill|927|ja|927}} ). * {{ill|Daiji (Japan)|ja|大治}} 2nd year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1127|ja|1127}} {{ill|November 25|ja|11月25日}} ） – {{ill|Minamoto no Yoshimitsu|ja|源義光}} , a military commander and younger brother of {{ill|Minamoto no Yoshiie|ja|源義家}} (* {{ill|1045|ja|1045}} ). * {{ill|Eikyō|ja|永享}} 5th year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1433|ja|1433}} {{ill|December 1|ja|12月1日}} ） – Emperor {{ill|Go-Komatsu|ja|後小松天皇}} , the 100th emperor of the Northern Court (* {{ill|1377|ja|1377}} ). * {{ill|Ansei|ja|安政}} 3rd year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1856|ja|1856}} {{ill|November 17|ja|11月17日}} ） – {{ill|Ninomiya Sontoku|ja|二宮尊徳}} , an agrarian reformer (* {{ill|1787|ja|1787}} ).

[[sn:September 23 (Old Lunar Calendar)]] [[ko:음력 9월 23일]] [[cdo:9 nguŏk 23 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:9月23日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 9월 23일]] [[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 23 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:九月廿三]] [[zh:九月廿三]] [[en:draft:September 23 (Old Lunar Calendar)]] {{Lunar September}} '''September 23''' is the 23rd day of month {{ill|September (Old Lunar Calendar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September}} the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}} . [[sn:September 23 (Old Lunar Calendar)]] [[ko:음력 9월 23일]] [[cdo:9 nguŏk 23 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:9月23日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 9월 23일]] [[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 23 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:九月廿三]] [[zh:九月廿三]] [[en:draft:September 23 (Old Lunar Calendar)]] {{Lunar September}} '''September 23''' is the 23rd day of month {{ill|September (Old Lunar Calendar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September}} the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Senshō|ja|先勝}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Wadō|ja|和銅}} 5th year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|712|ja|712}} {{ill|October 27|ja|10月27日}} ） – The region of Echigo split the Dewa district off into a separate Dewa Province. * {{ill|Teiji|ja|貞治}} 1st year/{{ill|Shōhei|ja|正平}} 17th year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1362|ja|1362}} {{ill|October 11|ja|10月11日}} ） – The Northern Court changed its era name from {{ill|Kang'an|ja|康安}} to {{ill|Teiji|ja|貞治}} . * {{ill|Kansei|ja|Kansei}} 12nd year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1800|ja|1800}} {{ill|December 7|ja|12月7日}} ） – Inō Tadataka completed his survey of Ezo and the Ōshū Kaidō, then returned to Edo and presented his preliminary map to the shogunate. * {{ill|Ansei|ja|安政}} 4th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1857|ja|1857}} {{ill|December 7|ja|12月7日}} ） – U.S. Consul {{ill|Townsend Harris|ja|ハリス}} visited Edo Castle and met with Tokugawa Iesada.
== Births == * {{ill|Genroku|ja|Genroku}} 15th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1702|ja|1702}} {{ill|October 24|ja|10月24日}} ） – {{ill|Yokoi Yayuu|ja|横井也有}} , a haiku poet († {{ill|1783|ja|1783}} ). * {{ill|Hōreki|ja|Hōreki}} 10th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1760|ja|1760}} {{ill|November 30|ja|11月30日}} ） – {{ill|Kawaoka Seishū|ja|華岡青洲}} , a physician and pioneer of anesthesia († {{ill|1835|ja|1835}} ). * {{ill|Bunka (era)|ja|文化 (元号)|lt=Bunka|lt_ja=文化}} 14th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1817|ja|1817}} {{ill|December 1|ja|12月1日}} ） – {{ill|Ono Yūgorō|ja|小野友五郎}} , a mathematician († {{ill|1898|ja|1898}} ). * {{ill|Kaei|ja|嘉永}} 2nd year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1849|ja|1849}} {{ill|December 7|ja|12月7日}} ） – {{ill|Saionji Kinmochi|ja|西園寺公望}} , who served as Prime Minister on two occasions and as genrō († {{ill|1940|ja|1940}} ). * {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治}} 4th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1871|ja|1871}} {{ill|December 5|ja|12月5日}} ） – {{ill|Doi Bansui|ja|土井晩翠}} , a poet († {{ill|1952|ja|1952}} ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Tenshōjingo|ja|Tenpyō神護}} 1st year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|765|ja|765}} {{ill|November 10|ja|11月10日}} ） – Emperor {{ill|Junnin|ja|淳仁天皇}} , the 47th emperor. * {{ill|Kanbun|ja|寛文}} 9th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1669|ja|1669}} {{ill|November 16|ja|11月16日}} ） – {{ill|Shakusha In|ja|シャクシャイン}} , the Ainu chief. * {{ill|Taihei Kōkoku|ja|太平興国}} 1st year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|976|ja|976}} {{ill|November 14|ja|11月14日}} ） – Emperor {{ill|Zhao Kuangyin|ja|趙匡胤}} (Taizu), the first emperor of the Northern Song (* {{ill|927|ja|927}} ). * {{ill|Daiji (Japan)|ja|大治}} 2nd year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1127|ja|1127}} {{ill|November 25|ja|11月25日}} ） – {{ill|Minamoto no Yoshimitsu|ja|源義光}} , a military commander and younger brother of {{ill|Minamoto no Yoshiie|ja|源義家}} (* {{ill|1045|ja|1045}} ). * {{ill|Eikyō|ja|永享}} 5th year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1433|ja|1433}} {{ill|December 1|ja|12月1日}} ） – Emperor {{ill|Go-Komatsu|ja|後小松天皇}} , the 100th emperor of the Northern Court (* {{ill|1377|ja|1377}} ). * {{ill|Ansei|ja|安政}} 3rd year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1856|ja|1856}} {{ill|November 17|ja|11月17日}} ） – {{ill|Ninomiya Sontoku|ja|二宮尊徳}} , an agrarian reformer (* {{ill|1787|ja|1787}} ).
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|9|22|9|24|8|23|10|9|0923}}

== Deaths == * {{ill|Tenshōjingo|ja|Tenpyō神護}} 1st year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|765|ja|765}} {{ill|November 10|ja|11月10日}} ） – Emperor {{ill|Junnin|ja|淳仁天皇}} , the 47th emperor. * {{ill|Kanbun|ja|寛文}} 9th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1669|ja|1669}} {{ill|November 16|ja|11月16日}} ） – {{ill|Shakusha In|ja|シャクシャイン}} , the Ainu chief. * {{ill|Taihei Kōkoku|ja|太平興国}} 1st year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|976|ja|976}} {{ill|November 14|ja|11月14日}} ） – Emperor {{ill|Zhao Kuangyin|ja|趙匡胤}} (Taizu), the first emperor of the Northern Song (* {{ill|927|ja|927}} ). * {{ill|Daiji (Japan)|ja|大治}} 2nd year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1127|ja|1127}} {{ill|November 25|ja|11月25日}} ） – {{ill|Minamoto no Yoshimitsu|ja|源義光}} , a military commander and younger brother of {{ill|Minamoto no Yoshiie|ja|源義家}} (* {{ill|1045|ja|1045}} ). * {{ill|Eikyō|ja|永享}} 5th year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1433|ja|1433}} {{ill|December 1|ja|12月1日}} ） – Emperor {{ill|Go-Komatsu|ja|後小松天皇}} , the 100th emperor of the Northern Court (* {{ill|1377|ja|1377}} ). * {{ill|Ansei|ja|安政}} 3rd year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1856|ja|1856}} {{ill|November 17|ja|11月17日}} ） – {{ill|Ninomiya Sontoku|ja|二宮尊徳}} , an agrarian reformer (* {{ill|1787|ja|1787}} ).

[[sn:September 23 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 9월 23일]] [[cdo:9 nguŏk 23 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:9月23日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 9월 23일]] [[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 23 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:九月廿三]] [[zh:九月廿三]] [[en:draft:September 23 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunar September}} '''September 23''' is the 23rd day of month {{ill|September (Lunisolar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September}} the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Senshō|ja|先勝}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Wadō|ja|和銅}} 5th year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|712|ja|712}} {{ill|October 27|ja|10月27日}} ） – The region of Echigo split the Dewa district off into a separate Dewa Province. * {{ill|Teiji|ja|貞治}} 1st year/{{ill|Shōhei|ja|正平}} 17th year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1362|ja|1362}} {{ill|October 11|ja|10月11日}} ） – The Northern Court changed its era name from {{ill|Kang'an|ja|康安}} to {{ill|Teiji|ja|貞治}} . * {{ill|Kansei|ja|Kansei}} 12nd year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1800|ja|1800}} {{ill|December 7|ja|12月7日}} ） – Inō Tadataka completed his survey of Ezo and the Ōshū Kaidō, then returned to Edo and presented his preliminary map to the shogunate. * {{ill|Ansei|ja|安政}} 4th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1857|ja|1857}} {{ill|December 7|ja|12月7日}} ） – U.S. Consul {{ill|Townsend Harris|ja|ハリス}} visited Edo Castle and met with Tokugawa Iesada.
== Births == * {{ill|Genroku|ja|Genroku}} 15th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1702|ja|1702}} {{ill|October 24|ja|10月24日}} ） – {{ill|Yokoi Yayuu|ja|横井也有}} , a haiku poet († {{ill|1783|ja|1783}} ). * {{ill|Hōreki|ja|Hōreki}} 10th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1760|ja|1760}} {{ill|November 30|ja|11月30日}} ） – {{ill|Kawaoka Seishū|ja|華岡青洲}} , a physician and pioneer of anesthesia († {{ill|1835|ja|1835}} ). * {{ill|Bunka (era)|ja|文化 (元号)|lt=Bunka|lt_ja=文化}} 14th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1817|ja|1817}} {{ill|December 1|ja|12月1日}} ） – {{ill|Ono Yūgorō|ja|小野友五郎}} , a mathematician († {{ill|1898|ja|1898}} ). * {{ill|Kaei|ja|嘉永}} 2nd year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1849|ja|1849}} {{ill|December 7|ja|12月7日}} ） – {{ill|Saionji Kinmochi|ja|西園寺公望}} , who served as Prime Minister on two occasions and as genrō († {{ill|1940|ja|1940}} ). * {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治}} 4th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1871|ja|1871}} {{ill|December 5|ja|12月5日}} ） – {{ill|Doi Bansui|ja|土井晩翠}} , a poet († {{ill|1952|ja|1952}} ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Tenshōjingo|ja|Tenpyō神護}} 1st year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|765|ja|765}} {{ill|November 10|ja|11月10日}} ） – Emperor {{ill|Junnin|ja|淳仁天皇}} , the 47th emperor. * {{ill|Kanbun|ja|寛文}} 9th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1669|ja|1669}} {{ill|November 16|ja|11月16日}} ） – {{ill|Shakusha In|ja|シャクシャイン}} , the Ainu chief. * {{ill|Taihei Kōkoku|ja|太平興国}} 1st year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|976|ja|976}} {{ill|November 14|ja|11月14日}} ） – Emperor {{ill|Zhao Kuangyin|ja|趙匡胤}} (Taizu), the first emperor of the Northern Song (* {{ill|927|ja|927}} ). * {{ill|Daiji (Japan)|ja|大治}} 2nd year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1127|ja|1127}} {{ill|November 25|ja|11月25日}} ） – {{ill|Minamoto no Yoshimitsu|ja|源義光}} , a military commander and younger brother of {{ill|Minamoto no Yoshiie|ja|源義家}} (* {{ill|1045|ja|1045}} ). * {{ill|Eikyō|ja|永享}} 5th year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1433|ja|1433}} {{ill|December 1|ja|12月1日}} ） – Emperor {{ill|Go-Komatsu|ja|後小松天皇}} , the 100th emperor of the Northern Court (* {{ill|1377|ja|1377}} ). * {{ill|Ansei|ja|安政}} 3rd year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1856|ja|1856}} {{ill|November 17|ja|11月17日}} ） – {{ill|Ninomiya Sontoku|ja|二宮尊徳}} , an agrarian reformer (* {{ill|1787|ja|1787}} ).

revision.text:
[[sn:September 23 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 9월 23일]] [[cdo:9 nguŏk 23 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:9月23日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 9월 23일]] [[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 23 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:九月廿三]] [[zh:九月廿三]] [[en:draft:September 23 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunar September}} '''September 23''' is the 23rd day of month {{ill|September (Lunisolar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September}} the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Senshō|ja|先勝}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Wadō|ja|和銅}} 5th year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|712|ja|712}} {{ill|October 27|ja|10月27日}} ） – The region of Echigo split the Dewa district off into a separate Dewa Province. * {{ill|Teiji|ja|貞治}} 1st year/{{ill|Shōhei|ja|正平}} 17th year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1362|ja|1362}} {{ill|October 11|ja|10月11日}} ） – The Northern Court changed its era name from {{ill|Kang'an|ja|康安}} to {{ill|Teiji|ja|貞治}} . * {{ill|Kansei|ja|Kansei}} 12nd year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1800|ja|1800}} {{ill|December 7|ja|12月7日}} ） – Inō Tadataka completed his survey of Ezo and the Ōshū Kaidō, then returned to Edo and presented his preliminary map to the shogunate. * {{ill|Ansei|ja|安政}} 4th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1857|ja|1857}} {{ill|December 7|ja|12月7日}} ） – U.S. Consul {{ill|Townsend Harris|ja|ハリス}} visited Edo Castle and met with Tokugawa Iesada.
== Births == * {{ill|Genroku|ja|Genroku}} 15th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1702|ja|1702}} {{ill|October 24|ja|10月24日}} ） – {{ill|Yokoi Yayuu|ja|横井也有}} , a haiku poet († {{ill|1783|ja|1783}} ). * {{ill|Hōreki|ja|Hōreki}} 10th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1760|ja|1760}} {{ill|November 30|ja|11月30日}} ） – {{ill|Kawaoka Seishū|ja|華岡青洲}} , a physician and pioneer of anesthesia († {{ill|1835|ja|1835}} ). * {{ill|Bunka (era)|ja|文化 (元号)|lt=Bunka|lt_ja=文化}} 14th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1817|ja|1817}} {{ill|December 1|ja|12月1日}} ） – {{ill|Ono Yūgorō|ja|小野友五郎}} , a mathematician († {{ill|1898|ja|1898}} ). * {{ill|Kaei|ja|嘉永}} 2nd year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1849|ja|1849}} {{ill|December 7|ja|12月7日}} ） – {{ill|Saionji Kinmochi|ja|西園寺公望}} , who served as Prime Minister on two occasions and as genrō († {{ill|1940|ja|1940}} ). * {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治}} 4th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1871|ja|1871}} {{ill|December 5|ja|12月5日}} ） – {{ill|Doi Bansui|ja|土井晩翠}} , a poet († {{ill|1952|ja|1952}} ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Tenshōjingo|ja|Tenpyō神護}} 1st year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|765|ja|765}} {{ill|November 10|ja|11月10日}} ） – Emperor {{ill|Junnin|ja|淳仁天皇}} , the 47th emperor. * {{ill|Kanbun|ja|寛文}} 9th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1669|ja|1669}} {{ill|November 16|ja|11月16日}} ） – {{ill|Shakusha In|ja|シャクシャイン}} , the Ainu chief. * {{ill|Taihei Kōkoku|ja|太平興国}} 1st year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|976|ja|976}} {{ill|November 14|ja|11月14日}} ） – Emperor {{ill|Zhao Kuangyin|ja|趙匡胤}} (Taizu), the first emperor of the Northern Song (* {{ill|927|ja|927}} ). * {{ill|Daiji (Japan)|ja|大治}} 2nd year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1127|ja|1127}} {{ill|November 25|ja|11月25日}} ） – {{ill|Minamoto no Yoshimitsu|ja|源義光}} , a military commander and younger brother of {{ill|Minamoto no Yoshiie|ja|源義家}} (* {{ill|1045|ja|1045}} ). * {{ill|Eikyō|ja|永享}} 5th year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1433|ja|1433}} {{ill|December 1|ja|12月1日}} ） – Emperor {{ill|Go-Komatsu|ja|後小松天皇}} , the 100th emperor of the Northern Court (* {{ill|1377|ja|1377}} ). * {{ill|Ansei|ja|安政}} 3rd year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1856|ja|1856}} {{ill|November 17|ja|11月17日}} ） – {{ill|Ninomiya Sontoku|ja|二宮尊徳}} , an agrarian reformer (* {{ill|1787|ja|1787}} ).
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|9|22|9|24|8|23|10|9|0923}}

== Deaths == * {{ill|Tenshōjingo|ja|Tenpyō神護}} 1st year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|765|ja|765}} {{ill|November 10|ja|11月10日}} ） – Emperor {{ill|Junnin|ja|淳仁天皇}} , the 47th emperor. * {{ill|Kanbun|ja|寛文}} 9th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1669|ja|1669}} {{ill|November 16|ja|11月16日}} ） – {{ill|Shakusha In|ja|シャクシャイン}} , the Ainu chief. * {{ill|Taihei Kōkoku|ja|太平興国}} 1st year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|976|ja|976}} {{ill|November 14|ja|11月14日}} ） – Emperor {{ill|Zhao Kuangyin|ja|趙匡胤}} (Taizu), the first emperor of the Northern Song (* {{ill|927|ja|927}} ). * {{ill|Daiji (Japan)|ja|大治}} 2nd year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1127|ja|1127}} {{ill|November 25|ja|11月25日}} ） – {{ill|Minamoto no Yoshimitsu|ja|源義光}} , a military commander and younger brother of {{ill|Minamoto no Yoshiie|ja|源義家}} (* {{ill|1045|ja|1045}} ). * {{ill|Eikyō|ja|永享}} 5th year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1433|ja|1433}} {{ill|December 1|ja|12月1日}} ） – Emperor {{ill|Go-Komatsu|ja|後小松天皇}} , the 100th emperor of the Northern Court (* {{ill|1377|ja|1377}} ). * {{ill|Ansei|ja|安政}} 3rd year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1856|ja|1856}} {{ill|November 17|ja|11月17日}} ） – {{ill|Ninomiya Sontoku|ja|二宮尊徳}} , an agrarian reformer (* {{ill|1787|ja|1787}} ).
== See Also ==

[[sn:September 23 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 9월 23일]] [[cdo:9 nguŏk 23 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:9月23日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 9월 23일]] [[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 23 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:九月廿三]] [[zh:九月廿三]] [[en:draft:September 23 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunar September}} '''September 23''' is the 23rd day of month {{ill|September (Lunisolar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September}} the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Senshō|ja|先勝}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Wadō|ja|和銅}} 5th year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|712|ja|712}} {{ill|October 27|ja|10月27日}} ） – The region of Echigo split the Dewa district off into a separate Dewa Province. * {{ill|Teiji|ja|貞治}} 1st year/{{ill|Shōhei|ja|正平}} 17th year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1362|ja|1362}} {{ill|October 11|ja|10月11日}} ） – The Northern Court changed its era name from {{ill|Kang'an|ja|康安}} to {{ill|Teiji|ja|貞治}} . * {{ill|Kansei|ja|Kansei}} 12nd year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1800|ja|1800}} {{ill|December 7|ja|12月7日}} ） – Inō Tadataka completed his survey of Ezo and the Ōshū Kaidō, then returned to Edo and presented his preliminary map to the shogunate. * {{ill|Ansei|ja|安政}} 4th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1857|ja|1857}} {{ill|December 7|ja|12月7日}} ） – U.S. Consul {{ill|Townsend Harris|ja|ハリス}} visited Edo Castle and met with Tokugawa Iesada.

== Deaths == * {{ill|Tenshōjingo|ja|Tenpyō神護}} 1st year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|765|ja|765}} {{ill|November 10|ja|11月10日}} ） – Emperor {{ill|Junnin|ja|淳仁天皇}} , the 47th emperor. * {{ill|Kanbun|ja|寛文}} 9th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1669|ja|1669}} {{ill|November 16|ja|11月16日}} ） – {{ill|Shakusha In|ja|シャクシャイン}} , the Ainu chief. * {{ill|Taihei Kōkoku|ja|太平興国}} 1st year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|976|ja|976}} {{ill|November 14|ja|11月14日}} ） – Emperor {{ill|Zhao Kuangyin|ja|趙匡胤}} (Taizu), the first emperor of the Northern Song (* {{ill|927|ja|927}} ). * {{ill|Daiji (Japan)|ja|大治}} 2nd year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1127|ja|1127}} {{ill|November 25|ja|11月25日}} ） – {{ill|Minamoto no Yoshimitsu|ja|源義光}} , a military commander and younger brother of {{ill|Minamoto no Yoshiie|ja|源義家}} (* {{ill|1045|ja|1045}} ). * {{ill|Eikyō|ja|永享}} 5th year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1433|ja|1433}} {{ill|December 1|ja|12月1日}} ） – Emperor {{ill|Go-Komatsu|ja|後小松天皇}} , the 100th emperor of the Northern Court (* {{ill|1377|ja|1377}} ). * {{ill|Ansei|ja|安政}} 3rd year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1856|ja|1856}} {{ill|November 17|ja|11月17日}} ） – {{ill|Ninomiya Sontoku|ja|二宮尊徳}} , an agrarian reformer (* {{ill|1787|ja|1787}} ).

[[sn:September 23 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 9월 23일]] [[cdo:9 nguŏk 23 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:9月23日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 9월 23일]] [[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 23 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:九月廿三]] [[zh:九月廿三]] [[en:draft:September 23 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunar September}} '''September 23''' is the 23rd day of month {{ill|September (Lunisolar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September}} the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Senshō|ja|先勝}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Wadō|ja|和銅}} 5th year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|712|ja|712}} {{ill|October 27|ja|10月27日}} ） – The region of Echigo split the Dewa district off into a separate Dewa Province. * {{ill|Teiji|ja|貞治}} 1st year/{{ill|Shōhei|ja|正平}} 17th year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1362|ja|1362}} {{ill|October 11|ja|10月11日}} ） – The Northern Court changed its era name from {{ill|Kang'an|ja|康安}} to {{ill|Teiji|ja|貞治}} . * {{ill|Kansei|ja|Kansei}} 12nd year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1800|ja|1800}} {{ill|December 7|ja|12月7日}} ） – Inō Tadataka completed his survey of Ezo and the Ōshū Kaidō, then returned to Edo and presented his preliminary map to the shogunate. * {{ill|Ansei|ja|安政}} 4th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1857|ja|1857}} {{ill|December 7|ja|12月7日}} ） – U.S. Consul {{ill|Townsend Harris|ja|ハリス}} visited Edo Castle and met with Tokugawa Iesada.
== Births == * {{ill|Genroku|ja|Genroku}} 15th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1702|ja|1702}} {{ill|October 24|ja|10月24日}} ） – {{ill|Yokoi Yayuu|ja|横井也有}} , a haiku poet († {{ill|1783|ja|1783}} ). * {{ill|Hōreki|ja|Hōreki}} 10th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1760|ja|1760}} {{ill|November 30|ja|11月30日}} ） – {{ill|Kawaoka Seishū|ja|華岡青洲}} , a physician and pioneer of anesthesia († {{ill|1835|ja|1835}} ). * {{ill|Bunka (era)|ja|文化 (元号)|lt=Bunka|lt_ja=文化}} 14th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1817|ja|1817}} {{ill|December 1|ja|12月1日}} ） – {{ill|Ono Yūgorō|ja|小野友五郎}} , a mathematician († {{ill|1898|ja|1898}} ). * {{ill|Kaei|ja|嘉永}} 2nd year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1849|ja|1849}} {{ill|December 7|ja|12月7日}} ） – {{ill|Saionji Kinmochi|ja|西園寺公望}} , who served as Prime Minister on two occasions and as genrō († {{ill|1940|ja|1940}} ). * {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治}} 4th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1871|ja|1871}} {{ill|December 5|ja|12月5日}} ） – {{ill|Doi Bansui|ja|土井晩翠}} , a poet († {{ill|1952|ja|1952}} ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Tenshōjingo|ja|Tenpyō神護}} 1st year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|765|ja|765}} {{ill|November 10|ja|11月10日}} ） – Emperor {{ill|Junnin|ja|淳仁天皇}} , the 47th emperor. * {{ill|Kanbun|ja|寛文}} 9th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1669|ja|1669}} {{ill|November 16|ja|11月16日}} ） – {{ill|Shakusha In|ja|シャクシャイン}} , the Ainu chief. * {{ill|Taihei Kōkoku|ja|太平興国}} 1st year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|976|ja|976}} {{ill|November 14|ja|11月14日}} ） – Emperor {{ill|Zhao Kuangyin|ja|趙匡胤}} (Taizu), the first emperor of the Northern Song (* {{ill|927|ja|927}} ). * {{ill|Daiji (Japan)|ja|大治}} 2nd year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1127|ja|1127}} {{ill|November 25|ja|11月25日}} ） – {{ill|Minamoto no Yoshimitsu|ja|源義光}} , a military commander and younger brother of {{ill|Minamoto no Yoshiie|ja|源義家}} (* {{ill|1045|ja|1045}} ). * {{ill|Eikyō|ja|永享}} 5th year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1433|ja|1433}} {{ill|December 1|ja|12月1日}} ） – Emperor {{ill|Go-Komatsu|ja|後小松天皇}} , the 100th emperor of the Northern Court (* {{ill|1377|ja|1377}} ). * {{ill|Ansei|ja|安政}} 3rd year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1856|ja|1856}} {{ill|November 17|ja|11月17日}} ） – {{ill|Ninomiya Sontoku|ja|二宮尊徳}} , an agrarian reformer (* {{ill|1787|ja|1787}} ).
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|9|22|9|24|8|23|10|9|0923}}

== Deaths == * {{ill|Tenshōjingo|ja|Tenpyō神護}} 1st year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|765|ja|765}} {{ill|November 10|ja|11月10日}} ） – Emperor {{ill|Junnin|ja|淳仁天皇}} , the 47th emperor. * {{ill|Kanbun|ja|寛文}} 9th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1669|ja|1669}} {{ill|November 16|ja|11月16日}} ） – {{ill|Shakusha In|ja|シャクシャイン}} , the Ainu chief. * {{ill|Taihei Kōkoku|ja|太平興国}} 1st year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|976|ja|976}} {{ill|November 14|ja|11月14日}} ） – Emperor {{ill|Zhao Kuangyin|ja|趙匡胤}} (Taizu), the first emperor of the Northern Song (* {{ill|927|ja|927}} ). * {{ill|Daiji (Japan)|ja|大治}} 2nd year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1127|ja|1127}} {{ill|November 25|ja|11月25日}} ） – {{ill|Minamoto no Yoshimitsu|ja|源義光}} , a military commander and younger brother of {{ill|Minamoto no Yoshiie|ja|源義家}} (* {{ill|1045|ja|1045}} ). * {{ill|Eikyō|ja|永享}} 5th year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1433|ja|1433}} {{ill|December 1|ja|12月1日}} ） – Emperor {{ill|Go-Komatsu|ja|後小松天皇}} , the 100th emperor of the Northern Court (* {{ill|1377|ja|1377}} ). * {{ill|Ansei|ja|安政}} 3rd year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1856|ja|1856}} {{ill|November 17|ja|11月17日}} ） – {{ill|Ninomiya Sontoku|ja|二宮尊徳}} , an agrarian reformer (* {{ill|1787|ja|1787}} ).== See Also ==

[[sn:September 23 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 9월 23일]] [[cdo:9 nguŏk 23 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:9月23日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 9월 23일]] [[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 23 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:九月廿三]] [[zh:九月廿三]] [[en:draft:September 23 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunar September}} '''September 23''' is the 23rd day of month {{ill|September (Lunisolar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September}} the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Senshō|ja|先勝}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Wadō|ja|和銅}} 5th year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|712|ja|712}} {{ill|October 27|ja|10月27日}} ） – The region of Echigo split the Dewa district off into a separate Dewa Province. * {{ill|Teiji|ja|貞治}} 1st year/{{ill|Shōhei|ja|正平}} 17th year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1362|ja|1362}} {{ill|October 11|ja|10月11日}} ） – The Northern Court changed its era name from {{ill|Kang'an|ja|康安}} to {{ill|Teiji|ja|貞治}} . * {{ill|Kansei|ja|Kansei}} 12nd year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1800|ja|1800}} {{ill|December 7|ja|12月7日}} ） – Inō Tadataka completed his survey of Ezo and the Ōshū Kaidō, then returned to Edo and presented his preliminary map to the shogunate. * {{ill|Ansei|ja|安政}} 4th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1857|ja|1857}} {{ill|December 7|ja|12月7日}} ） – U.S. Consul {{ill|Townsend Harris|ja|ハリス}} visited Edo Castle and met with Tokugawa Iesada.
== Births == * {{ill|Genroku|ja|Genroku}} 15th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1702|ja|1702}} {{ill|October 24|ja|10月24日}} ） – {{ill|Yokoi Yayuu|ja|横井也有}} , a haiku poet († {{ill|1783|ja|1783}} ). * {{ill|Hōreki|ja|Hōreki}} 10th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1760|ja|1760}} {{ill|November 30|ja|11月30日}} ） – {{ill|Kawaoka Seishū|ja|華岡青洲}} , a physician and pioneer of anesthesia († {{ill|1835|ja|1835}} ). * {{ill|Bunka (era)|ja|文化 (元号)|lt=Bunka|lt_ja=文化}} 14th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1817|ja|1817}} {{ill|December 1|ja|12月1日}} ） – {{ill|Ono Yūgorō|ja|小野友五郎}} , a mathematician († {{ill|1898|ja|1898}} ). * {{ill|Kaei|ja|嘉永}} 2nd year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1849|ja|1849}} {{ill|December 7|ja|12月7日}} ） – {{ill|Saionji Kinmochi|ja|西園寺公望}} , who served as Prime Minister on two occasions and as genrō († {{ill|1940|ja|1940}} ). * {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治}} 4th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1871|ja|1871}} {{ill|December 5|ja|12月5日}} ） – {{ill|Doi Bansui|ja|土井晩翠}} , a poet († {{ill|1952|ja|1952}} ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Tenshōjingo|ja|Tenpyō神護}} 1st year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|765|ja|765}} {{ill|November 10|ja|11月10日}} ） – Emperor {{ill|Junnin|ja|淳仁天皇}} , the 47th emperor. * {{ill|Kanbun|ja|寛文}} 9th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1669|ja|1669}} {{ill|November 16|ja|11月16日}} ） – {{ill|Shakusha In|ja|シャクシャイン}} , the Ainu chief. * {{ill|Taihei Kōkoku|ja|太平興国}} 1st year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|976|ja|976}} {{ill|November 14|ja|11月14日}} ） – Emperor {{ill|Zhao Kuangyin|ja|趙匡胤}} (Taizu), the first emperor of the Northern Song (* {{ill|927|ja|927}} ). * {{ill|Daiji (Japan)|ja|大治}} 2nd year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1127|ja|1127}} {{ill|November 25|ja|11月25日}} ） – {{ill|Minamoto no Yoshimitsu|ja|源義光}} , a military commander and younger brother of {{ill|Minamoto no Yoshiie|ja|源義家}} (* {{ill|1045|ja|1045}} ). * {{ill|Eikyō|ja|永享}} 5th year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1433|ja|1433}} {{ill|December 1|ja|12月1日}} ） – Emperor {{ill|Go-Komatsu|ja|後小松天皇}} , the 100th emperor of the Northern Court (* {{ill|1377|ja|1377}} ). * {{ill|Ansei|ja|安政}} 3rd year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1856|ja|1856}} {{ill|November 17|ja|11月17日}} ） – {{ill|Ninomiya Sontoku|ja|二宮尊徳}} , an agrarian reformer (* {{ill|1787|ja|1787}} ). == See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|9|22|9|24|8|23|10|9|0923}}

[[sn:September 23 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 9월 23일]] [[cdo:9 nguŏk 23 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:9月23日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 9월 23일]] [[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 23 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:九月廿三]] [[zh:九月廿三]] [[en:draft:September 23 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunar September}} '''September 23''' is the 23rd day of month {{ill|September (Lunisolar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September}} the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Senshō|ja|先勝}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Wadō|ja|和銅}} 5th year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|712|ja|712}} {{ill|October 27|ja|10月27日}} ） – The region of Echigo split the Dewa district off into a separate Dewa Province. * {{ill|Teiji|ja|貞治}} 1st year/{{ill|Shōhei|ja|正平}} 17th year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1362|ja|1362}} {{ill|October 11|ja|10月11日}} ） – The Northern Court changed its era name from {{ill|Kang'an|ja|康安}} to {{ill|Teiji|ja|貞治}} . * {{ill|Kansei|ja|Kansei}} 12nd year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1800|ja|1800}} {{ill|December 7|ja|12月7日}} ） – Inō Tadataka completed his survey of Ezo and the Ōshū Kaidō, then returned to Edo and presented his preliminary map to the shogunate. * {{ill|Ansei|ja|安政}} 4th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1857|ja|1857}} {{ill|December 7|ja|12月7日}} ） – U.S. Consul {{ill|Townsend Harris|ja|ハリス}} visited Edo Castle and met with Tokugawa Iesada.
== Births == * {{ill|Genroku|ja|Genroku}} 15th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1702|ja|1702}} {{ill|October 24|ja|10月24日}} ） – {{ill|Yokoi Yayuu|ja|横井也有}} , a haiku poet († {{ill|1783|ja|1783}} ). * {{ill|Hōreki|ja|Hōreki}} 10th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1760|ja|1760}} {{ill|November 30|ja|11月30日}} ） – {{ill|Kawaoka Seishū|ja|華岡青洲}} , a physician and pioneer of anesthesia († {{ill|1835|ja|1835}} ). * {{ill|Bunka (era)|ja|文化 (元号)|lt=Bunka|lt_ja=文化}} 14th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1817|ja|1817}} {{ill|December 1|ja|12月1日}} ） – {{ill|Ono Yūgorō|ja|小野友五郎}} , a mathematician († {{ill|1898|ja|1898}} ). * {{ill|Kaei|ja|嘉永}} 2nd year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1849|ja|1849}} {{ill|December 7|ja|12月7日}} ） – {{ill|Saionji Kinmochi|ja|西園寺公望}} , who served as Prime Minister on two occasions and as genrō († {{ill|1940|ja|1940}} ). * {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治}} 4th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1871|ja|1871}} {{ill|December 5|ja|12月5日}} ） – {{ill|Doi Bansui|ja|土井晩翠}} , a poet († {{ill|1952|ja|1952}} ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Tenshōjingo|ja|Tenpyō神護}} 1st year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|765|ja|765}} {{ill|November 10|ja|11月10日}} ） – Emperor {{ill|Junnin|ja|淳仁天皇}} , the 47th emperor. * {{ill|Kanbun|ja|寛文}} 9th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1669|ja|1669}} {{ill|November 16|ja|11月16日}} ） – {{ill|Shakusha In|ja|シャクシャイン}} , the Ainu chief. * {{ill|Taihei Kōkoku|ja|太平興国}} 1st year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|976|ja|976}} {{ill|November 14|ja|11月14日}} ） – Emperor {{ill|Zhao Kuangyin|ja|趙匡胤}} (Taizu), the first emperor of the Northern Song (* {{ill|927|ja|927}} ). * {{ill|Daiji (Japan)|ja|大治}} 2nd year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1127|ja|1127}} {{ill|November 25|ja|11月25日}} ） – {{ill|Minamoto no Yoshimitsu|ja|源義光}} , a military commander and younger brother of {{ill|Minamoto no Yoshiie|ja|源義家}} (* {{ill|1045|ja|1045}} ). * {{ill|Eikyō|ja|永享}} 5th year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1433|ja|1433}} {{ill|December 1|ja|12月1日}} ） – Emperor {{ill|Go-Komatsu|ja|後小松天皇}} , the 100th emperor of the Northern Court (* {{ill|1377|ja|1377}} ). * {{ill|Ansei|ja|安政}} 3rd year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1856|ja|1856}} {{ill|November 17|ja|11月17日}} ） – {{ill|Ninomiya Sontoku|ja|二宮尊徳}} , an agrarian reformer (* {{ill|1787|ja|1787}} ).

== Deaths == * {{ill|Tenshōjingo|ja|Tenpyō神護}} 1st year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|765|ja|765}} {{ill|November 10|ja|11月10日}} ） – Emperor {{ill|Junnin|ja|淳仁天皇}} , the 47th emperor. * {{ill|Kanbun|ja|寛文}} 9th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1669|ja|1669}} {{ill|November 16|ja|11月16日}} ） – {{ill|Shakusha In|ja|シャクシャイン}} , the Ainu chief. * {{ill|Taihei Kōkoku|ja|太平興国}} 1st year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|976|ja|976}} {{ill|November 14|ja|11月14日}} ） – Emperor {{ill|Zhao Kuangyin|ja|趙匡胤}} (Taizu), the first emperor of the Northern Song (* {{ill|927|ja|927}} ). * {{ill|Daiji (Japan)|ja|大治}} 2nd year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1127|ja|1127}} {{ill|November 25|ja|11月25日}} ） – {{ill|Minamoto no Yoshimitsu|ja|源義光}} , a military commander and younger brother of {{ill|Minamoto no Yoshiie|ja|源義家}} (* {{ill|1045|ja|1045}} ). * {{ill|Eikyō|ja|永享}} 5th year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1433|ja|1433}} {{ill|December 1|ja|12月1日}} ） – Emperor {{ill|Go-Komatsu|ja|後小松天皇}} , the 100th emperor of the Northern Court (* {{ill|1377|ja|1377}} ). * {{ill|Ansei|ja|安政}} 3rd year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1856|ja|1856}} {{ill|November 17|ja|11月17日}} ） – {{ill|Ninomiya Sontoku|ja|二宮尊徳}} , an agrarian reformer (* {{ill|1787|ja|1787}} ).

[[sn:September 23 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 9월 23일]] [[cdo:9 nguŏk 23 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:9月23日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 9월 23일]] [[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 23 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:九月廿三]] [[zh:九月廿三]] [[en:draft:September 23 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunisolar September}} '''September 23''' is the 23rd day of month {{ill|September (Lunisolar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September}} the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Senshō|ja|先勝}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Wadō|ja|和銅}} 5th year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|712|ja|712}} {{ill|October 27|ja|10月27日}} ） – The region of Echigo split the Dewa district off into a separate Dewa Province. * {{ill|Teiji|ja|貞治}} 1st year/{{ill|Shōhei|ja|正平}} 17th year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1362|ja|1362}} {{ill|October 11|ja|10月11日}} ） – The Northern Court changed its era name from {{ill|Kang'an|ja|康安}} to {{ill|Teiji|ja|貞治}} . * {{ill|Kansei|ja|Kansei}} 12nd year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1800|ja|1800}} {{ill|December 7|ja|12月7日}} ） – Inō Tadataka completed his survey of Ezo and the Ōshū Kaidō, then returned to Edo and presented his preliminary map to the shogunate. * {{ill|Ansei|ja|安政}} 4th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1857|ja|1857}} {{ill|December 7|ja|12月7日}} ） – U.S. Consul {{ill|Townsend Harris|ja|ハリス}} visited Edo Castle and met with Tokugawa Iesada.
== Births == * {{ill|Genroku|ja|Genroku}} 15th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1702|ja|1702}} {{ill|October 24|ja|10月24日}} ） – {{ill|Yokoi Yayuu|ja|横井也有}} , a haiku poet († {{ill|1783|ja|1783}} ). * {{ill|Hōreki|ja|Hōreki}} 10th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1760|ja|1760}} {{ill|November 30|ja|11月30日}} ） – {{ill|Kawaoka Seishū|ja|華岡青洲}} , a physician and pioneer of anesthesia († {{ill|1835|ja|1835}} ). * {{ill|Bunka (era)|ja|文化 (元号)|lt=Bunka|lt_ja=文化}} 14th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1817|ja|1817}} {{ill|December 1|ja|12月1日}} ） – {{ill|Ono Yūgorō|ja|小野友五郎}} , a mathematician († {{ill|1898|ja|1898}} ). * {{ill|Kaei|ja|嘉永}} 2nd year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1849|ja|1849}} {{ill|December 7|ja|12月7日}} ） – {{ill|Saionji Kinmochi|ja|西園寺公望}} , who served as Prime Minister on two occasions and as genrō († {{ill|1940|ja|1940}} ). * {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治}} 4th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1871|ja|1871}} {{ill|December 5|ja|12月5日}} ） – {{ill|Doi Bansui|ja|土井晩翠}} , a poet († {{ill|1952|ja|1952}} ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Tenshōjingo|ja|Tenpyō神護}} 1st year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|765|ja|765}} {{ill|November 10|ja|11月10日}} ） – Emperor {{ill|Junnin|ja|淳仁天皇}} , the 47th emperor. * {{ill|Kanbun|ja|寛文}} 9th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1669|ja|1669}} {{ill|November 16|ja|11月16日}} ） – {{ill|Shakusha In|ja|シャクシャイン}} , the Ainu chief. * {{ill|Taihei Kōkoku|ja|太平興国}} 1st year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|976|ja|976}} {{ill|November 14|ja|11月14日}} ） – Emperor {{ill|Zhao Kuangyin|ja|趙匡胤}} (Taizu), the first emperor of the Northern Song (* {{ill|927|ja|927}} ). * {{ill|Daiji (Japan)|ja|大治}} 2nd year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1127|ja|1127}} {{ill|November 25|ja|11月25日}} ） – {{ill|Minamoto no Yoshimitsu|ja|源義光}} , a military commander and younger brother of {{ill|Minamoto no Yoshiie|ja|源義家}} (* {{ill|1045|ja|1045}} ). * {{ill|Eikyō|ja|永享}} 5th year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1433|ja|1433}} {{ill|December 1|ja|12月1日}} ） – Emperor {{ill|Go-Komatsu|ja|後小松天皇}} , the 100th emperor of the Northern Court (* {{ill|1377|ja|1377}} ). * {{ill|Ansei|ja|安政}} 3rd year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1856|ja|1856}} {{ill|November 17|ja|11月17日}} ） – {{ill|Ninomiya Sontoku|ja|二宮尊徳}} , an agrarian reformer (* {{ill|1787|ja|1787}} ).
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|9|22|9|24|8|23|10|9|0923}}

revision.comment: Text replacement - "Japanese Traditional Lunar Months" to "Japanese Traditional Lunisolar Months"
revision.text:
[[sn:September 23 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 9월 23일]] [[cdo:9 nguŏk 23 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:9月23日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 9월 23일]] [[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 23 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:九月廿三]] [[zh:九月廿三]] [[en:draft:September 23 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunisolar September}} '''September 23''' is the 23rd day of month {{ill|September (Lunisolar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September}} the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Senshō|ja|先勝}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Wadō|ja|和銅}} 5th year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|712|ja|712}} {{ill|October 27|ja|10月27日}} ） – The region of Echigo split the Dewa district off into a separate Dewa Province. * {{ill|Teiji|ja|貞治}} 1st year/{{ill|Shōhei|ja|正平}} 17th year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1362|ja|1362}} {{ill|October 11|ja|10月11日}} ） – The Northern Court changed its era name from {{ill|Kang'an|ja|康安}} to {{ill|Teiji|ja|貞治}} . * {{ill|Kansei|ja|Kansei}} 12nd year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1800|ja|1800}} {{ill|December 7|ja|12月7日}} ） – Inō Tadataka completed his survey of Ezo and the Ōshū Kaidō, then returned to Edo and presented his preliminary map to the shogunate. * {{ill|Ansei|ja|安政}} 4th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1857|ja|1857}} {{ill|December 7|ja|12月7日}} ） – U.S. Consul {{ill|Townsend Harris|ja|ハリス}} visited Edo Castle and met with Tokugawa Iesada.
== Births == * {{ill|Genroku|ja|Genroku}} 15th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1702|ja|1702}} {{ill|October 24|ja|10月24日}} ） – {{ill|Yokoi Yayuu|ja|横井也有}} , a haiku poet († {{ill|1783|ja|1783}} ). * {{ill|Hōreki|ja|Hōreki}} 10th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1760|ja|1760}} {{ill|November 30|ja|11月30日}} ） – {{ill|Kawaoka Seishū|ja|華岡青洲}} , a physician and pioneer of anesthesia († {{ill|1835|ja|1835}} ). * {{ill|Bunka (era)|ja|文化 (元号)|lt=Bunka|lt_ja=文化}} 14th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1817|ja|1817}} {{ill|December 1|ja|12月1日}} ） – {{ill|Ono Yūgorō|ja|小野友五郎}} , a mathematician († {{ill|1898|ja|1898}} ). * {{ill|Kaei|ja|嘉永}} 2nd year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1849|ja|1849}} {{ill|December 7|ja|12月7日}} ） – {{ill|Saionji Kinmochi|ja|西園寺公望}} , who served as Prime Minister on two occasions and as genrō († {{ill|1940|ja|1940}} ). * {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治}} 4th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1871|ja|1871}} {{ill|December 5|ja|12月5日}} ） – {{ill|Doi Bansui|ja|土井晩翠}} , a poet († {{ill|1952|ja|1952}} ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Tenshōjingo|ja|Tenpyō神護}} 1st year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|765|ja|765}} {{ill|November 10|ja|11月10日}} ） – Emperor {{ill|Junnin|ja|淳仁天皇}} , the 47th emperor. * {{ill|Kanbun|ja|寛文}} 9th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1669|ja|1669}} {{ill|November 16|ja|11月16日}} ） – {{ill|Shakusha In|ja|シャクシャイン}} , the Ainu chief. * {{ill|Taihei Kōkoku|ja|太平興国}} 1st year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|976|ja|976}} {{ill|November 14|ja|11月14日}} ） – Emperor {{ill|Zhao Kuangyin|ja|趙匡胤}} (Taizu), the first emperor of the Northern Song (* {{ill|927|ja|927}} ). * {{ill|Daiji (Japan)|ja|大治}} 2nd year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1127|ja|1127}} {{ill|November 25|ja|11月25日}} ） – {{ill|Minamoto no Yoshimitsu|ja|源義光}} , a military commander and younger brother of {{ill|Minamoto no Yoshiie|ja|源義家}} (* {{ill|1045|ja|1045}} ). * {{ill|Eikyō|ja|永享}} 5th year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1433|ja|1433}} {{ill|December 1|ja|12月1日}} ） – Emperor {{ill|Go-Komatsu|ja|後小松天皇}} , the 100th emperor of the Northern Court (* {{ill|1377|ja|1377}} ). * {{ill|Ansei|ja|安政}} 3rd year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1856|ja|1856}} {{ill|November 17|ja|11月17日}} ） – {{ill|Ninomiya Sontoku|ja|二宮尊徳}} , an agrarian reformer (* {{ill|1787|ja|1787}} ).
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|9|22|9|24|8|23|10|9|0923}}

[[sn:September 23 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 9월 23일]] [[cdo:9 nguŏk 23 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:9月23日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 9월 23일]] [[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 23 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:九月廿三]] [[zh:九月廿三]] [[en:draft:September 23 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunisolar September}} '''September 23''' is the 23rd day of month {{ill|September (Lunisolar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September}} the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Senshō|ja|先勝}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Wadō|ja|和銅}} 5th year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|712|ja|712}} {{ill|October 27|ja|10月27日}} ） – The region of Echigo split the Dewa district off into a separate Dewa Province. * {{ill|Teiji|ja|貞治}} 1st year/{{ill|Shōhei|ja|正平}} 17th year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1362|ja|1362}} {{ill|October 11|ja|10月11日}} ） – The Northern Court changed its era name from {{ill|Kang'an|ja|康安}} to {{ill|Teiji|ja|貞治}} . * {{ill|Kansei|ja|Kansei}} 12nd year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1800|ja|1800}} {{ill|December 7|ja|12月7日}} ） – Inō Tadataka completed his survey of Ezo and the Ōshū Kaidō, then returned to Edo and presented his preliminary map to the shogunate. * {{ill|Ansei|ja|安政}} 4th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1857|ja|1857}} {{ill|December 7|ja|12月7日}} ） – U.S. Consul {{ill|Townsend Harris|ja|ハリス}} visited Edo Castle and met with Tokugawa Iesada.
== Births == * {{ill|Genroku|ja|Genroku}} 15th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1702|ja|1702}} {{ill|October 24|ja|10月24日}} ） – {{ill|Yokoi Yayuu|ja|横井也有}} , a haiku poet († {{ill|1783|ja|1783}} ). * {{ill|Hōreki|ja|Hōreki}} 10th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1760|ja|1760}} {{ill|November 30|ja|11月30日}} ） – {{ill|Kawaoka Seishū|ja|華岡青洲}} , a physician and pioneer of anesthesia († {{ill|1835|ja|1835}} ). * {{ill|Bunka (era)|ja|文化 (元号)|lt=Bunka|lt_ja=文化}} 14th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1817|ja|1817}} {{ill|December 1|ja|12月1日}} ） – {{ill|Ono Yūgorō|ja|小野友五郎}} , a mathematician († {{ill|1898|ja|1898}} ). * {{ill|Kaei|ja|嘉永}} 2nd year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1849|ja|1849}} {{ill|December 7|ja|12月7日}} ） – {{ill|Saionji Kinmochi|ja|西園寺公望}} , who served as Prime Minister on two occasions and as genrō († {{ill|1940|ja|1940}} ). * {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治}} 4th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1871|ja|1871}} {{ill|December 5|ja|12月5日}} ） – {{ill|Doi Bansui|ja|土井晩翠}} , a poet († {{ill|1952|ja|1952}} ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Tenshōjingo|ja|Tenpyō神護}} 1st year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|765|ja|765}} {{ill|November 10|ja|11月10日}} ） – Emperor {{ill|Junnin|ja|淳仁天皇}} , the 47th emperor. * {{ill|Kanbun|ja|寛文}} 9th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1669|ja|1669}} {{ill|November 16|ja|11月16日}} ） – {{ill|Shakusha In|ja|シャクシャイン}} , the Ainu chief. * {{ill|Taihei Kōkoku|ja|太平興国}} 1st year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|976|ja|976}} {{ill|November 14|ja|11月14日}} ） – Emperor {{ill|Zhao Kuangyin|ja|趙匡胤}} (Taizu), the first emperor of the Northern Song (* {{ill|927|ja|927}} ). * {{ill|Daiji (Japan)|ja|大治}} 2nd year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1127|ja|1127}} {{ill|November 25|ja|11月25日}} ） – {{ill|Minamoto no Yoshimitsu|ja|源義光}} , a military commander and younger brother of {{ill|Minamoto no Yoshiie|ja|源義家}} (* {{ill|1045|ja|1045}} ). * {{ill|Eikyō|ja|永享}} 5th year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1433|ja|1433}} {{ill|December 1|ja|12月1日}} ） – Emperor {{ill|Go-Komatsu|ja|後小松天皇}} , the 100th emperor of the Northern Court (* {{ill|1377|ja|1377}} ). * {{ill|Ansei|ja|安政}} 3rd year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1856|ja|1856}} {{ill|November 17|ja|11月17日}} ） – {{ill|Ninomiya Sontoku|ja|二宮尊徳}} , an agrarian reformer (* {{ill|1787|ja|1787}} ).

== Events == * {{ill|Wadō|ja|和銅}} 5th year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|712|ja|712}} {{ill|October 27|ja|10月27日}} ） – The region of Echigo split the Dewa district off into a separate Dewa Province. * {{ill|Teiji|ja|貞治}} 1st year/{{ill|Shōhei|ja|正平}} 17th year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1362|ja|1362}} {{ill|October 11|ja|10月11日}} ） – The Northern Court changed its era name from {{ill|Kang'an|ja|康安}} to {{ill|Teiji|ja|貞治}} . * {{ill|Kansei|ja|Kansei}} 12nd year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1800|ja|1800}} {{ill|December 7|ja|12月7日}} ） – Inō Tadataka completed his survey of Ezo and the Ōshū Kaidō, then returned to Edo and presented his preliminary map to the shogunate. * {{ill|Ansei|ja|安政}} 4th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1857|ja|1857}} {{ill|December 7|ja|12月7日}} ） – U.S. Consul {{ill|Townsend Harris|ja|ハリス}} visited Edo Castle and met with Tokugawa Iesada.
== Births == * {{ill|Genroku|ja|Genroku}} 15th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1702|ja|1702}} {{ill|October 24|ja|10月24日}} ） – {{ill|Yokoi Yayuu|ja|横井也有}} , a haiku poet († {{ill|1783|ja|1783}} ). * {{ill|Hōreki|ja|Hōreki}} 10th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1760|ja|1760}} {{ill|November 30|ja|11月30日}} ） – {{ill|Kawaoka Seishū|ja|華岡青洲}} , a physician and pioneer of anesthesia († {{ill|1835|ja|1835}} ). * {{ill|Bunka (era)|ja|文化 (元号)|lt=Bunka|lt_ja=文化}} 14th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1817|ja|1817}} {{ill|December 1|ja|12月1日}} ） – {{ill|Ono Yūgorō|ja|小野友五郎}} , a mathematician († {{ill|1898|ja|1898}} ). * {{ill|Kaei|ja|嘉永}} 2nd year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1849|ja|1849}} {{ill|December 7|ja|12月7日}} ） – {{ill|Saionji Kinmochi|ja|西園寺公望}} , who served as Prime Minister on two occasions and as genrō († {{ill|1940|ja|1940}} ). * {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治}} 4th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1871|ja|1871}} {{ill|December 5|ja|12月5日}} ） – {{ill|Doi Bansui|ja|土井晩翠}} , a poet († {{ill|1952|ja|1952}} ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Tenshōjingo|ja|Tenpyō神護}} 1st year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|765|ja|765}} {{ill|November 10|ja|11月10日}} ） – Emperor {{ill|Junnin|ja|淳仁天皇}} , the 47th emperor. * {{ill|Kanbun|ja|寛文}} 9th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1669|ja|1669}} {{ill|November 16|ja|11月16日}} ） – {{ill|Shakusha In|ja|シャクシャイン}} , the Ainu chief. * {{ill|Taihei Kōkoku|ja|太平興国}} 1st year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|976|ja|976}} {{ill|November 14|ja|11月14日}} ） – Emperor {{ill|Zhao Kuangyin|ja|趙匡胤}} (Taizu), the first emperor of the Northern Song (* {{ill|927|ja|927}} ). * {{ill|Daiji (Japan)|ja|大治}} 2nd year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1127|ja|1127}} {{ill|November 25|ja|11月25日}} ） – {{ill|Minamoto no Yoshimitsu|ja|源義光}} , a military commander and younger brother of {{ill|Minamoto no Yoshiie|ja|源義家}} (* {{ill|1045|ja|1045}} ). * {{ill|Eikyō|ja|永享}} 5th year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1433|ja|1433}} {{ill|December 1|ja|12月1日}} ） – Emperor {{ill|Go-Komatsu|ja|後小松天皇}} , the 100th emperor of the Northern Court (* {{ill|1377|ja|1377}} ). * {{ill|Ansei|ja|安政}} 3rd year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1856|ja|1856}} {{ill|November 17|ja|11月17日}} ） – {{ill|Ninomiya Sontoku|ja|二宮尊徳}} , an agrarian reformer (* {{ill|1787|ja|1787}} ).
