[[cdo:9 nguŏk 23 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 23 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:九月廿三]] {{Lunisolar September}} '''September 23''' is the 23rd day of month {{ill|September (Lunisolar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September|12=draft}} the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=draft}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=draft}} day is {{ill|Senshō|ja|先勝|12=draft}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Wadō|ja|和銅|12=draft}} 5th year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft}} {{ill|712|ja|712|12=draft}} {{ill|October 27|ja|10月27日|12=draft}} ） – The region of Echigo split the Dewa district off into a separate Dewa Province. * {{ill|Teiji|ja|貞治|12=draft}} 1st year/{{ill|Shōhei|ja|正平|12=draft}} 17th year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft}} {{ill|1362|ja|1362|12=draft}} {{ill|October 11|ja|10月11日|12=draft}} ） – The Northern Court changed its era name from {{ill|Kang'an|ja|康安|12=draft}} to {{ill|Teiji|ja|貞治|12=draft}} . * {{ill|Kansei|ja|Kansei|12=draft}} 12nd year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} {{ill|1800|ja|1800|12=draft}} {{ill|December 7|ja|12月7日|12=draft}} ） – Inō Tadataka completed his survey of Ezo and the Ōshū Kaidō, then returned to Edo and presented his preliminary map to the shogunate. * {{ill|Ansei|ja|安政|12=draft}} 4th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} {{ill|1857|ja|1857|12=draft}} {{ill|December 7|ja|12月7日|12=draft}} ） – U.S. Consul {{ill|Townsend Harris|ja|ハリス|12=draft}} visited Edo Castle and met with Tokugawa Iesada.
== Births == * {{ill|Genroku|ja|Genroku|12=draft}} 15th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} {{ill|1702|ja|1702|12=draft}} {{ill|October 24|ja|10月24日|12=draft}} ） – {{ill|Yokoi Yayuu|ja|横井也有|12=draft}} , a haiku poet († {{ill|1783|ja|1783|12=draft}} ). * {{ill|Hōreki|ja|Hōreki|12=draft}} 10th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} {{ill|1760|ja|1760|12=draft}} {{ill|November 30|ja|11月30日|12=draft}} ） – {{ill|Kawaoka Seishū|ja|華岡青洲|12=draft}} , a physician and pioneer of anesthesia († {{ill|1835|ja|1835|12=draft}} ). * {{ill|Bunka (era)|ja|文化 (元号)|lt=Bunka|lt_ja=文化|12=draft}} 14th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} {{ill|1817|ja|1817|12=draft}} {{ill|December 1|ja|12月1日|12=draft}} ） – {{ill|Ono Yūgorō|ja|小野友五郎|12=draft}} , a mathematician († {{ill|1898|ja|1898|12=draft}} ). * {{ill|Kaei|ja|嘉永|12=draft}} 2nd year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} {{ill|1849|ja|1849|12=draft}} {{ill|December 7|ja|12月7日|12=draft}} ） – {{ill|Saionji Kinmochi|ja|西園寺公望|12=draft}} , who served as Prime Minister on two occasions and as genrō († {{ill|1940|ja|1940|12=draft}} ). * {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治|12=draft}} 4th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} {{ill|1871|ja|1871|12=draft}} {{ill|December 5|ja|12月5日|12=draft}} ） – {{ill|Doi Bansui|ja|土井晩翠|12=draft}} , a poet († {{ill|1952|ja|1952|12=draft}} ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Tenshōjingo|ja|Tenpyō神護|12=draft}} 1st year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft}} {{ill|765|ja|765|12=draft}} {{ill|November 10|ja|11月10日|12=draft}} ） – Emperor {{ill|Junnin|ja|淳仁天皇|12=draft}} , the 47th emperor. * {{ill|Kanbun|ja|寛文|12=draft}} 9th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} {{ill|1669|ja|1669|12=draft}} {{ill|November 16|ja|11月16日|12=draft}} ） – {{ill|Shakusha In|ja|シャクシャイン|12=draft}} , the Ainu chief. * {{ill|Taihei Kōkoku|ja|太平興国|12=draft}} 1st year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft}} {{ill|976|ja|976|12=draft}} {{ill|November 14|ja|11月14日|12=draft}} ） – Emperor {{ill|Zhao Kuangyin|ja|趙匡胤|12=draft}} (Taizu), the first emperor of the Northern Song (* {{ill|927|ja|927|12=draft}} ). * {{ill|Daiji (Japan)|ja|大治|12=draft}} 2nd year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft}} {{ill|1127|ja|1127|12=draft}} {{ill|November 25|ja|11月25日|12=draft}} ） – {{ill|Minamoto no Yoshimitsu|ja|源義光|12=draft}} , a military commander and younger brother of {{ill|Minamoto no Yoshiie|ja|源義家|12=draft}} (* {{ill|1045|ja|1045|12=draft}} ). * {{ill|Eikyō|ja|永享|12=draft}} 5th year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft}} {{ill|1433|ja|1433|12=draft}} {{ill|December 1|ja|12月1日|12=draft}} ） – Emperor {{ill|Go-Komatsu|ja|後小松天皇|12=draft}} , the 100th emperor of the Northern Court (* {{ill|1377|ja|1377|12=draft}} ). * {{ill|Ansei|ja|安政|12=draft}} 3rd year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} {{ill|1856|ja|1856|12=draft}} {{ill|November 17|ja|11月17日|12=draft}} ） – {{ill|Ninomiya Sontoku|ja|二宮尊徳|12=draft}} , an agrarian reformer (* {{ill|1787|ja|1787|12=draft}} ).
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|9|22|9|24|8|23|10|9|0923}}
[[cdo:9 nguŏk 23 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 23 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:九月廿三]] [[cdo:9 nguŏk 23 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 23 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:九月廿三]] [[cdo:9 nguŏk 23 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 23 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:九月廿三]]

[[cdo:9 nguŏk 23 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 23 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:九月廿三]] {{Lunisolar September}} '''September 23''' is the 23rd day of month {{ill|September (Lunisolar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September|12=draft|12=draft}} the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=draft|12=draft}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=draft|12=draft}} day is {{ill|Senshō|ja|先勝|12=draft|12=draft}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Wadō|ja|和銅|12=draft|12=draft}} 5th year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|712|ja|712|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|October 27|ja|10月27日|12=draft|12=draft}} ） – The region of Echigo split the Dewa district off into a separate Dewa Province. * {{ill|Teiji|ja|貞治|12=draft|12=draft}} 1st year/{{ill|Shōhei|ja|正平|12=draft|12=draft}} 17th year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1362|ja|1362|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|October 11|ja|10月11日|12=draft|12=draft}} ） – The Northern Court changed its era name from {{ill|Kang'an|ja|康安|12=draft|12=draft}} to {{ill|Teiji|ja|貞治|12=draft|12=draft}} . * {{ill|Kansei|ja|Kansei|12=draft|12=draft}} 12nd year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1800|ja|1800|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|December 7|ja|12月7日|12=draft|12=draft}} ） – Inō Tadataka completed his survey of Ezo and the Ōshū Kaidō, then returned to Edo and presented his preliminary map to the shogunate. * {{ill|Ansei|ja|安政|12=draft|12=draft}} 4th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1857|ja|1857|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|December 7|ja|12月7日|12=draft|12=draft}} ） – U.S. Consul {{ill|Townsend Harris|ja|ハリス|12=draft|12=draft}} visited Edo Castle and met with Tokugawa Iesada.
== Births == * {{ill|Genroku|ja|Genroku|12=draft|12=draft}} 15th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1702|ja|1702|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|October 24|ja|10月24日|12=draft|12=draft}} ） – {{ill|Yokoi Yayuu|ja|横井也有|12=draft|12=draft}} , a haiku poet († {{ill|1783|ja|1783|12=draft|12=draft}} ). * {{ill|Hōreki|ja|Hōreki|12=draft|12=draft}} 10th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1760|ja|1760|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|November 30|ja|11月30日|12=draft|12=draft}} ） – {{ill|Kawaoka Seishū|ja|華岡青洲|12=draft|12=draft}} , a physician and pioneer of anesthesia († {{ill|1835|ja|1835|12=draft|12=draft}} ). * {{ill|Bunka (era)|ja|文化 (元号)|lt=Bunka|lt_ja=文化|12=draft|12=draft}} 14th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1817|ja|1817|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|December 1|ja|12月1日|12=draft|12=draft}} ） – {{ill|Ono Yūgorō|ja|小野友五郎|12=draft|12=draft}} , a mathematician († {{ill|1898|ja|1898|12=draft|12=draft}} ). * {{ill|Kaei|ja|嘉永|12=draft|12=draft}} 2nd year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1849|ja|1849|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|December 7|ja|12月7日|12=draft|12=draft}} ） – {{ill|Saionji Kinmochi|ja|西園寺公望|12=draft|12=draft}} , who served as Prime Minister on two occasions and as genrō († {{ill|1940|ja|1940|12=draft|12=draft}} ). * {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治|12=draft|12=draft}} 4th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1871|ja|1871|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|December 5|ja|12月5日|12=draft|12=draft}} ） – {{ill|Doi Bansui|ja|土井晩翠|12=draft|12=draft}} , a poet († {{ill|1952|ja|1952|12=draft|12=draft}} ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Tenshōjingo|ja|Tenpyō神護|12=draft|12=draft}} 1st year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|765|ja|765|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|November 10|ja|11月10日|12=draft|12=draft}} ） – Emperor {{ill|Junnin|ja|淳仁天皇|12=draft|12=draft}} , the 47th emperor. * {{ill|Kanbun|ja|寛文|12=draft|12=draft}} 9th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1669|ja|1669|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|November 16|ja|11月16日|12=draft|12=draft}} ） – {{ill|Shakusha In|ja|シャクシャイン|12=draft|12=draft}} , the Ainu chief. * {{ill|Taihei Kōkoku|ja|太平興国|12=draft|12=draft}} 1st year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|976|ja|976|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|November 14|ja|11月14日|12=draft|12=draft}} ） – Emperor {{ill|Zhao Kuangyin|ja|趙匡胤|12=draft|12=draft}} (Taizu), the first emperor of the Northern Song (* {{ill|927|ja|927|12=draft|12=draft}} ). * {{ill|Daiji (Japan)|ja|大治|12=draft|12=draft}} 2nd year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1127|ja|1127|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|November 25|ja|11月25日|12=draft|12=draft}} ） – {{ill|Minamoto no Yoshimitsu|ja|源義光|12=draft|12=draft}} , a military commander and younger brother of {{ill|Minamoto no Yoshiie|ja|源義家|12=draft|12=draft}} (* {{ill|1045|ja|1045|12=draft|12=draft}} ). * {{ill|Eikyō|ja|永享|12=draft|12=draft}} 5th year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1433|ja|1433|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|December 1|ja|12月1日|12=draft|12=draft}} ） – Emperor {{ill|Go-Komatsu|ja|後小松天皇|12=draft|12=draft}} , the 100th emperor of the Northern Court (* {{ill|1377|ja|1377|12=draft|12=draft}} ). * {{ill|Ansei|ja|安政|12=draft|12=draft}} 3rd year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1856|ja|1856|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|November 17|ja|11月17日|12=draft|12=draft}} ） – {{ill|Ninomiya Sontoku|ja|二宮尊徳|12=draft|12=draft}} , an agrarian reformer (* {{ill|1787|ja|1787|12=draft|12=draft}} ).

== Deaths == * {{ill|Tenshōjingo|ja|Tenpyō神護|12=draft|12=draft}} 1st year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|765|ja|765|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|November 10|ja|11月10日|12=draft|12=draft}} ） – Emperor {{ill|Junnin|ja|淳仁天皇|12=draft|12=draft}} , the 47th emperor. * {{ill|Kanbun|ja|寛文|12=draft|12=draft}} 9th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1669|ja|1669|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|November 16|ja|11月16日|12=draft|12=draft}} ） – {{ill|Shakusha In|ja|シャクシャイン|12=draft|12=draft}} , the Ainu chief. * {{ill|Taihei Kōkoku|ja|太平興国|12=draft|12=draft}} 1st year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|976|ja|976|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|November 14|ja|11月14日|12=draft|12=draft}} ） – Emperor {{ill|Zhao Kuangyin|ja|趙匡胤|12=draft|12=draft}} (Taizu), the first emperor of the Northern Song (* {{ill|927|ja|927|12=draft|12=draft}} ). * {{ill|Daiji (Japan)|ja|大治|12=draft|12=draft}} 2nd year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1127|ja|1127|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|November 25|ja|11月25日|12=draft|12=draft}} ） – {{ill|Minamoto no Yoshimitsu|ja|源義光|12=draft|12=draft}} , a military commander and younger brother of {{ill|Minamoto no Yoshiie|ja|源義家|12=draft|12=draft}} (* {{ill|1045|ja|1045|12=draft|12=draft}} ). * {{ill|Eikyō|ja|永享|12=draft|12=draft}} 5th year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1433|ja|1433|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|December 1|ja|12月1日|12=draft|12=draft}} ） – Emperor {{ill|Go-Komatsu|ja|後小松天皇|12=draft|12=draft}} , the 100th emperor of the Northern Court (* {{ill|1377|ja|1377|12=draft|12=draft}} ). * {{ill|Ansei|ja|安政|12=draft|12=draft}} 3rd year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1856|ja|1856|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|November 17|ja|11月17日|12=draft|12=draft}} ） – {{ill|Ninomiya Sontoku|ja|二宮尊徳|12=draft|12=draft}} , an agrarian reformer (* {{ill|1787|ja|1787|12=draft|12=draft}} ).

[[cdo:9 nguŏk 23 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 23 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:九月廿三]] {{Lunisolar September}} '''September 23''' is the 23rd day of month {{ill|September (Lunisolar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September|12=draft|12=draft}} the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=draft|12=draft}} . == Deaths == * {{ill|Tenshōjingo|ja|Tenpyō神護|12=draft|12=draft}} 1st year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|765|ja|765|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|November 10|ja|11月10日|12=draft|12=draft}} ） – Emperor {{ill|Junnin|ja|淳仁天皇|12=draft|12=draft}} , the 47th emperor. * {{ill|Kanbun|ja|寛文|12=draft|12=draft}} 9th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1669|ja|1669|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|November 16|ja|11月16日|12=draft|12=draft}} ） – {{ill|Shakusha In|ja|シャクシャイン|12=draft|12=draft}} , the Ainu chief. * {{ill|Taihei Kōkoku|ja|太平興国|12=draft|12=draft}} 1st year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|976|ja|976|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|November 14|ja|11月14日|12=draft|12=draft}} ） – Emperor {{ill|Zhao Kuangyin|ja|趙匡胤|12=draft|12=draft}} (Taizu), the first emperor of the Northern Song (* {{ill|927|ja|927|12=draft|12=draft}} ). * {{ill|Daiji (Japan)|ja|大治|12=draft|12=draft}} 2nd year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1127|ja|1127|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|November 25|ja|11月25日|12=draft|12=draft}} ） – {{ill|Minamoto no Yoshimitsu|ja|源義光|12=draft|12=draft}} , a military commander and younger brother of {{ill|Minamoto no Yoshiie|ja|源義家|12=draft|12=draft}} (* {{ill|1045|ja|1045|12=draft|12=draft}} ). * {{ill|Eikyō|ja|永享|12=draft|12=draft}} 5th year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1433|ja|1433|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|December 1|ja|12月1日|12=draft|12=draft}} ） – Emperor {{ill|Go-Komatsu|ja|後小松天皇|12=draft|12=draft}} , the 100th emperor of the Northern Court (* {{ill|1377|ja|1377|12=draft|12=draft}} ). * {{ill|Ansei|ja|安政|12=draft|12=draft}} 3rd year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1856|ja|1856|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|November 17|ja|11月17日|12=draft|12=draft}} ） – {{ill|Ninomiya Sontoku|ja|二宮尊徳|12=draft|12=draft}} , an agrarian reformer (* {{ill|1787|ja|1787|12=draft|12=draft}} ).

revision.text:
[[cdo:9 nguŏk 23 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 23 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:九月廿三]] {{Lunisolar September}} '''September 23''' is the 23rd day of month {{ill|September (Lunisolar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September|12=draft|12=draft}} the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=draft|12=draft}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=draft|12=draft}} day is {{ill|Senshō|ja|先勝|12=draft|12=draft}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Wadō|ja|和銅|12=draft|12=draft}} 5th year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|712|ja|712|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|October 27|ja|10月27日|12=draft|12=draft}} ） – The region of Echigo split the Dewa district off into a separate Dewa Province. * {{ill|Teiji|ja|貞治|12=draft|12=draft}} 1st year/{{ill|Shōhei|ja|正平|12=draft|12=draft}} 17th year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1362|ja|1362|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|October 11|ja|10月11日|12=draft|12=draft}} ） – The Northern Court changed its era name from {{ill|Kang'an|ja|康安|12=draft|12=draft}} to {{ill|Teiji|ja|貞治|12=draft|12=draft}} . * {{ill|Kansei|ja|Kansei|12=draft|12=draft}} 12nd year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1800|ja|1800|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|December 7|ja|12月7日|12=draft|12=draft}} ） – Inō Tadataka completed his survey of Ezo and the Ōshū Kaidō, then returned to Edo and presented his preliminary map to the shogunate. * {{ill|Ansei|ja|安政|12=draft|12=draft}} 4th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1857|ja|1857|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|December 7|ja|12月7日|12=draft|12=draft}} ） – U.S. Consul {{ill|Townsend Harris|ja|ハリス|12=draft|12=draft}} visited Edo Castle and met with Tokugawa Iesada.
== Births == * {{ill|Genroku|ja|Genroku|12=draft|12=draft}} 15th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1702|ja|1702|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|October 24|ja|10月24日|12=draft|12=draft}} ） – {{ill|Yokoi Yayuu|ja|横井也有|12=draft|12=draft}} , a haiku poet († {{ill|1783|ja|1783|12=draft|12=draft}} ). * {{ill|Hōreki|ja|Hōreki|12=draft|12=draft}} 10th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1760|ja|1760|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|November 30|ja|11月30日|12=draft|12=draft}} ） – {{ill|Kawaoka Seishū|ja|華岡青洲|12=draft|12=draft}} , a physician and pioneer of anesthesia († {{ill|1835|ja|1835|12=draft|12=draft}} ). * {{ill|Bunka (era)|ja|文化 (元号)|lt=Bunka|lt_ja=文化|12=draft|12=draft}} 14th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1817|ja|1817|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|December 1|ja|12月1日|12=draft|12=draft}} ） – {{ill|Ono Yūgorō|ja|小野友五郎|12=draft|12=draft}} , a mathematician († {{ill|1898|ja|1898|12=draft|12=draft}} ). * {{ill|Kaei|ja|嘉永|12=draft|12=draft}} 2nd year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1849|ja|1849|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|December 7|ja|12月7日|12=draft|12=draft}} ） – {{ill|Saionji Kinmochi|ja|西園寺公望|12=draft|12=draft}} , who served as Prime Minister on two occasions and as genrō († {{ill|1940|ja|1940|12=draft|12=draft}} ). * {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治|12=draft|12=draft}} 4th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1871|ja|1871|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|December 5|ja|12月5日|12=draft|12=draft}} ） – {{ill|Doi Bansui|ja|土井晩翠|12=draft|12=draft}} , a poet († {{ill|1952|ja|1952|12=draft|12=draft}} ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Tenshōjingo|ja|Tenpyō神護|12=draft|12=draft}} 1st year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|765|ja|765|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|November 10|ja|11月10日|12=draft|12=draft}} ） – Emperor {{ill|Junnin|ja|淳仁天皇|12=draft|12=draft}} , the 47th emperor. * {{ill|Kanbun|ja|寛文|12=draft|12=draft}} 9th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1669|ja|1669|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|November 16|ja|11月16日|12=draft|12=draft}} ） – {{ill|Shakusha In|ja|シャクシャイン|12=draft|12=draft}} , the Ainu chief. * {{ill|Taihei Kōkoku|ja|太平興国|12=draft|12=draft}} 1st year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|976|ja|976|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|November 14|ja|11月14日|12=draft|12=draft}} ） – Emperor {{ill|Zhao Kuangyin|ja|趙匡胤|12=draft|12=draft}} (Taizu), the first emperor of the Northern Song (* {{ill|927|ja|927|12=draft|12=draft}} ). * {{ill|Daiji (Japan)|ja|大治|12=draft|12=draft}} 2nd year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1127|ja|1127|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|November 25|ja|11月25日|12=draft|12=draft}} ） – {{ill|Minamoto no Yoshimitsu|ja|源義光|12=draft|12=draft}} , a military commander and younger brother of {{ill|Minamoto no Yoshiie|ja|源義家|12=draft|12=draft}} (* {{ill|1045|ja|1045|12=draft|12=draft}} ). * {{ill|Eikyō|ja|永享|12=draft|12=draft}} 5th year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1433|ja|1433|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|December 1|ja|12月1日|12=draft|12=draft}} ） – Emperor {{ill|Go-Komatsu|ja|後小松天皇|12=draft|12=draft}} , the 100th emperor of the Northern Court (* {{ill|1377|ja|1377|12=draft|12=draft}} ). * {{ill|Ansei|ja|安政|12=draft|12=draft}} 3rd year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1856|ja|1856|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|November 17|ja|11月17日|12=draft|12=draft}} ） – {{ill|Ninomiya Sontoku|ja|二宮尊徳|12=draft|12=draft}} , an agrarian reformer (* {{ill|1787|ja|1787|12=draft|12=draft}} ).

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:9 nguŏk 23 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:9月23日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 9월 23일]][[zh_min_nan:9 goe̍h 23 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh_yue:九月廿三]][[zh:九月廿三]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q840365]] Wikidata name: 23rd day of the 9th month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 09:13, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|September 23|qq=September 23}}[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]]<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=九月廿三|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 9월 23일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar September|qq=}} '''September 23''' is the 23rd day of month {{ill|September (Lunisolar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September (Nagatsuki)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/September (Lunisolar)|qq=}} the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Senshū|qid=Q96759839}}{{efn|ja|先勝|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senshō|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}} .
== Events == * [[:en:Wadō (era)|Wadō]] 5th year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:712|712]] [[:en:October 27|October 27]] ） – The region of Echigo split the Dewa district off into a separate Dewa Province. * [[:en:Jōji|Teiji]] 1st year/[[:en:Zhengping|Shōhei]] 17th year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1362|1362]] [[:en:October 11|October 11]] ） – The Northern Court changed its era name from [[:en:Kōan (Muromachi period)|Kang'an]] to [[:en:Jōji|Teiji]] . * [[Kansei]]{{efn|January 1789 through February 1801|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kansei|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 12nd year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1800|1800]] [[:en:December 7|December 7]] ） – Inō Tadataka completed his survey of Ezo and the Ōshū Kaidō, then returned to Edo and presented his preliminary map to the shogunate. * [[:en:Ansei|Ansei]] 4th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1857|1857]] [[:en:December 7|December 7]] ） – U.S. Consul [[:en:Harris|Townsend Harris]] visited Edo Castle and met with Tokugawa Iesada. == Births == * {{ill|Genroku|1=Genroku|2=ja|3=元禄|qid=Q1325001|ja|Genroku|1=Genroku|2=ja|3=元禄|qid=Q1325001|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Genroku|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1325001}} 15th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1702|1702]] [[:en:October 24|October 24]] ） – [[:en:Yokoi Yayū|Yokoi Yayuu]] , a haiku poet († [[:en:1783|1783]] ). * [[:en:Hōreki|Hōreki]] 10th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1760|1760]] [[:en:November 30|November 30]] ） – [[:en:Hanaoka Seishū|Kawaoka Seishū]] , a physician and pioneer of anesthesia († [[:en:1835|1835]] ). * [[:en:Bunka|Bunka]] 14th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1817|1817]] [[:en:December 1|December 1]] ） – {{ill|Ono Yūgorō|ja|小野友五郎|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ono Yūgorō|qq=|1=Ono Tomogorō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q6463981}} , a mathematician († [[:en:1898|1898]] ). * [[:en:Kaei|Kaei]] 2nd year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1849|1849]] [[:en:December 7|December 7]] ） – [[:en:Saionji Kinmochi|Saionji Kinmochi]] , who served as Prime Minister on two occasions and as genrō († [[:en:1940|1940]] ). * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 4th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1871|1871]] [[:en:December 5|December 5]] ） – {{ill|Doi Bansui|ja|土井晩翠|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Doi Bansui|qq=|1=Bansui Doi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1234919}} , a poet († [[:en:1952|1952]] ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Tenshōjingo|ja|Tenpyō神護|1=Tenpyō-jingo|2=ja|3=天平神護|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenshōjingo|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1373181}} 1st year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:765|765]] [[:en:November 10|November 10]] ） – Emperor [[:en:Emperor Junnin|Junnin]] , the 47th emperor. * [[:en:Kanbun (era)|Kanbun]] 9th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1669|1669]] [[:en:November 16|November 16]] ） – {{ill|Shakusha In|ja|シャクシャイン|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shakusha In|qq=|comment=changed title based on wikidata|1=Shakushain|WD=Q3280296}} , the Ainu chief. * {{ill|Taihei Kōkoku|ja|太平興国|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taihei Kōkoku|qq=|1=Taipingxinguo|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10941278}} 1st year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:976|976]] [[:en:November 14|November 14]] ） – Emperor [[:en:Emperor Taizu of Song|Zhao Kuangyin]] (Taizu), the first emperor of the Northern Song (* [[:en:927|927]] ). * {{ill|Daiji (Japan)|ja|大治|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Daiji (Japan)|qq=|1=Daiji (Japan)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10936305}} 2nd year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1127|1127]] [[:en:November 25|November 25]] ） – [[:en:Minamoto no Yoshimitsu|Minamoto no Yoshimitsu]] , a military commander and younger brother of [[:en:Minamoto no Yoshiie|Minamoto no Yoshiie]] (* [[:en:1045|1045]] ). * [[:en:Eikyō|Eikyō]] 5th year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1433|1433]] [[:en:December 1|December 1]] ） – Emperor [[:en:Emperor Go-Komatsu|Go-Komatsu]] , the 100th emperor of the Northern Court (* [[:en:1377|1377]] ). * [[:en:Ansei|Ansei]] 3rd year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1856|1856]] [[:en:November 17|November 17]] ） – [[:en:Ninomiya Sontoku|Ninomiya Sontoku]] , an agrarian reformer (* [[:en:1787|1787]] ).

== Events == * [[:en:Wadō (era)|Wadō]] 5th year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:712|712]] [[:en:October 27|October 27]] ） – The region of Echigo split the Dewa district off into a separate Dewa Province. * [[:en:Jōji|Teiji]] 1st year/[[:en:Zhengping|Shōhei]] 17th year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1362|1362]] [[:en:October 11|October 11]] ） – The Northern Court changed its era name from [[:en:Kōan (Muromachi period)|Kang'an]] to [[:en:Jōji|Teiji]] . * [[Kansei]]{{efn|January 1789 through February 1801|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kansei|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 12nd year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1800|1800]] [[:en:December 7|December 7]] ） – Inō Tadataka completed his survey of Ezo and the Ōshū Kaidō, then returned to Edo and presented his preliminary map to the shogunate. * [[:en:Ansei|Ansei]] 4th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1857|1857]] [[:en:December 7|December 7]] ） – U.S. Consul [[:en:Harris|Townsend Harris]] visited Edo Castle and met with Tokugawa Iesada. == Births == * {{ill|Genroku|1=Genroku|2=ja|3=元禄|WD=Q1325001|ja|Genroku|1=Genroku|2=ja|3=元禄|WD=Q1325001|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Genroku|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1325001}} 15th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1702|1702]] [[:en:October 24|October 24]] ） – [[:en:Yokoi Yayū|Yokoi Yayuu]] , a haiku poet († [[:en:1783|1783]] ). * [[:en:Hōreki|Hōreki]] 10th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1760|1760]] [[:en:November 30|November 30]] ） – [[:en:Hanaoka Seishū|Kawaoka Seishū]] , a physician and pioneer of anesthesia († [[:en:1835|1835]] ). * [[:en:Bunka|Bunka]] 14th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1817|1817]] [[:en:December 1|December 1]] ） – {{ill|Ono Yūgorō|ja|小野友五郎|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ono Yūgorō|qq=|1=Ono Tomogorō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q6463981}} , a mathematician († [[:en:1898|1898]] ). * [[:en:Kaei|Kaei]] 2nd year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1849|1849]] [[:en:December 7|December 7]] ） – [[:en:Saionji Kinmochi|Saionji Kinmochi]] , who served as Prime Minister on two occasions and as genrō († [[:en:1940|1940]] ). * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 4th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1871|1871]] [[:en:December 5|December 5]] ） – {{ill|Doi Bansui|ja|土井晩翠|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Doi Bansui|qq=|1=Bansui Doi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1234919}} , a poet († [[:en:1952|1952]] ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Tenshōjingo|ja|Tenpyō神護|1=Tenpyō-jingo|2=ja|3=天平神護|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenshōjingo|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1373181}} 1st year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:765|765]] [[:en:November 10|November 10]] ） – Emperor [[:en:Emperor Junnin|Junnin]] , the 47th emperor. * [[:en:Kanbun (era)|Kanbun]] 9th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1669|1669]] [[:en:November 16|November 16]] ） – {{ill|Shakusha In|ja|シャクシャイン|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shakusha In|qq=|comment=changed title based on wikidata|1=Shakushain|WD=Q3280296}} , the Ainu chief. * {{ill|Taihei Kōkoku|ja|太平興国|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taihei Kōkoku|qq=|1=Taipingxinguo|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10941278}} 1st year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:976|976]] [[:en:November 14|November 14]] ） – Emperor [[:en:Emperor Taizu of Song|Zhao Kuangyin]] (Taizu), the first emperor of the Northern Song (* [[:en:927|927]] ). * {{ill|Daiji (Japan)|ja|大治|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Daiji (Japan)|qq=|1=Daiji (Japan)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10936305}} 2nd year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1127|1127]] [[:en:November 25|November 25]] ） – [[:en:Minamoto no Yoshimitsu|Minamoto no Yoshimitsu]] , a military commander and younger brother of [[:en:Minamoto no Yoshiie|Minamoto no Yoshiie]] (* [[:en:1045|1045]] ). * [[:en:Eikyō|Eikyō]] 5th year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1433|1433]] [[:en:December 1|December 1]] ） – Emperor [[:en:Emperor Go-Komatsu|Go-Komatsu]] , the 100th emperor of the Northern Court (* [[:en:1377|1377]] ). * [[:en:Ansei|Ansei]] 3rd year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1856|1856]] [[:en:November 17|November 17]] ） – [[:en:Ninomiya Sontoku|Ninomiya Sontoku]] , an agrarian reformer (* [[:en:1787|1787]] ).

Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=九月廿三|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 9월 23일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar September|qq=}} '''September 23''' is the 23rd day of month {{ill|September (Lunisolar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September (Nagatsuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/September (Lunisolar)|qq=}} the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Senshū|WD=Q96759839}}{{efn|ja|先勝|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senshō|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}} .
== Events == * [[:en:Wadō (era)|Wadō]] 5th year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:712|712]] [[:en:October 27|October 27]] ） – The region of Echigo split the Dewa district off into a separate Dewa Province. * [[:en:Jōji|Teiji]] 1st year/[[:en:Zhengping|Shōhei]] 17th year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1362|1362]] [[:en:October 11|October 11]] ） – The Northern Court changed its era name from [[:en:Kōan (Muromachi period)|Kang'an]] to [[:en:Jōji|Teiji]] . * [[Kansei]]{{efn|January 1789 through February 1801|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kansei|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 12nd year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1800|1800]] [[:en:December 7|December 7]] ） – Inō Tadataka completed his survey of Ezo and the Ōshū Kaidō, then returned to Edo and presented his preliminary map to the shogunate. * [[:en:Ansei|Ansei]] 4th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1857|1857]] [[:en:December 7|December 7]] ） – U.S. Consul [[:en:Harris|Townsend Harris]] visited Edo Castle and met with Tokugawa Iesada. == Births == * {{ill|Genroku|1=Genroku|2=ja|3=元禄|WD=Q1325001|ja|Genroku|1=Genroku|2=ja|3=元禄|WD=Q1325001|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Genroku|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1325001}} 15th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1702|1702]] [[:en:October 24|October 24]] ） – [[:en:Yokoi Yayū|Yokoi Yayuu]] , a haiku poet († [[:en:1783|1783]] ). * [[:en:Hōreki|Hōreki]] 10th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1760|1760]] [[:en:November 30|November 30]] ） – [[:en:Hanaoka Seishū|Kawaoka Seishū]] , a physician and pioneer of anesthesia († [[:en:1835|1835]] ). * [[:en:Bunka|Bunka]] 14th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1817|1817]] [[:en:December 1|December 1]] ） – {{ill|Ono Yūgorō|ja|小野友五郎|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ono Yūgorō|1=Ono Tomogorō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q6463981}} , a mathematician († [[:en:1898|1898]] ). * [[:en:Kaei|Kaei]] 2nd year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1849|1849]] [[:en:December 7|December 7]] ） – [[:en:Saionji Kinmochi|Saionji Kinmochi]] , who served as Prime Minister on two occasions and as genrō († [[:en:1940|1940]] ). * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 4th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1871|1871]] [[:en:December 5|December 5]] ） – {{ill|Doi Bansui|ja|土井晩翠|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Doi Bansui|1=Bansui Doi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1234919}} , a poet († [[:en:1952|1952]] ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Tenshōjingo|ja|Tenpyō神護|1=Tenpyō-jingo|2=ja|3=天平神護|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenshōjingo|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1373181}} 1st year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:765|765]] [[:en:November 10|November 10]] ） – Emperor [[:en:Emperor Junnin|Junnin]] , the 47th emperor. * [[:en:Kanbun (era)|Kanbun]] 9th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1669|1669]] [[:en:November 16|November 16]] ） – {{ill|Shakusha In|ja|シャクシャイン|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shakusha In|comment=changed title based on wikidata|1=Shakushain|WD=Q3280296}} , the Ainu chief. * {{ill|Taihei Kōkoku|ja|太平興国|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taihei Kōkoku|1=Taipingxinguo|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10941278}} 1st year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:976|976]] [[:en:November 14|November 14]] ） – Emperor [[:en:Emperor Taizu of Song|Zhao Kuangyin]] (Taizu), the first emperor of the Northern Song (* [[:en:927|927]] ). * {{ill|Daiji (Japan)|ja|大治|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Daiji (Japan)|1=Daiji (Japan)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10936305}} 2nd year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1127|1127]] [[:en:November 25|November 25]] ） – [[:en:Minamoto no Yoshimitsu|Minamoto no Yoshimitsu]] , a military commander and younger brother of [[:en:Minamoto no Yoshiie|Minamoto no Yoshiie]] (* [[:en:1045|1045]] ). * [[:en:Eikyō|Eikyō]] 5th year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1433|1433]] [[:en:December 1|December 1]] ） – Emperor [[:en:Emperor Go-Komatsu|Go-Komatsu]] , the 100th emperor of the Northern Court (* [[:en:1377|1377]] ). * [[:en:Ansei|Ansei]] 3rd year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1856|1856]] [[:en:November 17|November 17]] ） – [[:en:Ninomiya Sontoku|Ninomiya Sontoku]] , an agrarian reformer (* [[:en:1787|1787]] ).

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:9 nguŏk 23 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:9月23日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 9월 23일]][[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 23 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:九月廿三]][[zh:九月廿三]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q840365]] Wikidata name: 23rd day of the 9th month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 09:13, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|September 23|qq=September 23}}[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]]<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=九月廿三|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 9월 23일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar September|qq=}} '''September 23''' is the 23rd day of month {{ill|September (Lunisolar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September (Nagatsuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/September (Lunisolar)|qq=}} the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Senshū|WD=Q96759839}}{{efn|ja|先勝|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senshō|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}} .
== Events == * [[:en:Wadō (era)|Wadō]] 5th year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:712|712]] [[:en:October 27|October 27]] ） – The region of Echigo split the Dewa district off into a separate Dewa Province. * [[:en:Jōji|Teiji]] 1st year/[[:en:Zhengping|Shōhei]] 17th year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1362|1362]] [[:en:October 11|October 11]] ） – The Northern Court changed its era name from [[:en:Kōan (Muromachi period)|Kang'an]] to [[:en:Jōji|Teiji]] . * [[Kansei]]{{efn|January 1789 through February 1801|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kansei|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 12nd year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1800|1800]] [[:en:December 7|December 7]] ） – Inō Tadataka completed his survey of Ezo and the Ōshū Kaidō, then returned to Edo and presented his preliminary map to the shogunate. * [[:en:Ansei|Ansei]] 4th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1857|1857]] [[:en:December 7|December 7]] ） – U.S. Consul [[:en:Harris|Townsend Harris]] visited Edo Castle and met with Tokugawa Iesada. == Births == * {{ill|Genroku|1=Genroku|2=ja|3=元禄|WD=Q1325001|ja|Genroku|1=Genroku|2=ja|3=元禄|WD=Q1325001|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Genroku|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1325001}} 15th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1702|1702]] [[:en:October 24|October 24]] ） – [[:en:Yokoi Yayū|Yokoi Yayuu]] , a haiku poet († [[:en:1783|1783]] ). * [[:en:Hōreki|Hōreki]] 10th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1760|1760]] [[:en:November 30|November 30]] ） – [[:en:Hanaoka Seishū|Kawaoka Seishū]] , a physician and pioneer of anesthesia († [[:en:1835|1835]] ). * [[:en:Bunka|Bunka]] 14th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1817|1817]] [[:en:December 1|December 1]] ） – {{ill|Ono Yūgorō|ja|小野友五郎|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ono Yūgorō|1=Ono Tomogorō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q6463981}} , a mathematician († [[:en:1898|1898]] ). * [[:en:Kaei|Kaei]] 2nd year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1849|1849]] [[:en:December 7|December 7]] ） – [[:en:Saionji Kinmochi|Saionji Kinmochi]] , who served as Prime Minister on two occasions and as genrō († [[:en:1940|1940]] ). * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 4th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1871|1871]] [[:en:December 5|December 5]] ） – {{ill|Doi Bansui|ja|土井晩翠|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Doi Bansui|1=Bansui Doi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1234919}} , a poet († [[:en:1952|1952]] ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Tenshōjingo|ja|Tenpyō神護|1=Tenpyō-jingo|2=ja|3=天平神護|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenshōjingo|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1373181}} 1st year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:765|765]] [[:en:November 10|November 10]] ） – Emperor [[:en:Emperor Junnin|Junnin]] , the 47th emperor. * [[:en:Kanbun (era)|Kanbun]] 9th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1669|1669]] [[:en:November 16|November 16]] ） – {{ill|Shakusha In|ja|シャクシャイン|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shakusha In|comment=changed title based on wikidata|1=Shakushain|WD=Q3280296}} , the Ainu chief. * {{ill|Taihei Kōkoku|ja|太平興国|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taihei Kōkoku|1=Taipingxinguo|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10941278}} 1st year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:976|976]] [[:en:November 14|November 14]] ） – Emperor [[:en:Emperor Taizu of Song|Zhao Kuangyin]] (Taizu), the first emperor of the Northern Song (* [[:en:927|927]] ). * {{ill|Daiji (Japan)|ja|大治|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Daiji (Japan)|1=Daiji (Japan)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10936305}} 2nd year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1127|1127]] [[:en:November 25|November 25]] ） – [[:en:Minamoto no Yoshimitsu|Minamoto no Yoshimitsu]] , a military commander and younger brother of [[:en:Minamoto no Yoshiie|Minamoto no Yoshiie]] (* [[:en:1045|1045]] ). * [[:en:Eikyō|Eikyō]] 5th year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1433|1433]] [[:en:December 1|December 1]] ） – Emperor [[:en:Emperor Go-Komatsu|Go-Komatsu]] , the 100th emperor of the Northern Court (* [[:en:1377|1377]] ). * [[:en:Ansei|Ansei]] 3rd year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1856|1856]] [[:en:November 17|November 17]] ） – [[:en:Ninomiya Sontoku|Ninomiya Sontoku]] , an agrarian reformer (* [[:en:1787|1787]] ).

It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Senshū|WD=Q96759839}}{{efn|ja|先勝|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senshō|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}} .
== Events == * [[:en:Wadō (era)|Wadō]] 5th year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:712|712]] [[:en:October 27|October 27]] ） – The region of Echigo split the Dewa district off into a separate Dewa Province. * [[:en:Jōji|Teiji]] 1st year/[[:en:Zhengping|Shōhei]] 17th year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1362|1362]] [[:en:October 11|October 11]] ） – The Northern Court changed its era name from [[:en:Kōan (Muromachi period)|Kang'an]] to [[:en:Jōji|Teiji]] . * [[Kansei]]{{efn|January 1789 through February 1801|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kansei|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 12nd year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1800|1800]] [[:en:December 7|December 7]] ） – Inō Tadataka completed his survey of Ezo and the Ōshū Kaidō, then returned to Edo and presented his preliminary map to the shogunate. * [[:en:Ansei|Ansei]] 4th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1857|1857]] [[:en:December 7|December 7]] ） – U.S. Consul [[:en:Harris|Townsend Harris]] visited Edo Castle and met with Tokugawa Iesada. == Births == * {{ill|Genroku|1=Genroku|2=ja|3=元禄|WD=Q1325001|ja|Genroku|1=Genroku|2=ja|3=元禄|WD=Q1325001|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Genroku|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1325001}} 15th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1702|1702]] [[:en:October 24|October 24]] ） – [[:en:Yokoi Yayū|Yokoi Yayuu]] , a haiku poet († [[:en:1783|1783]] ). * [[:en:Hōreki|Hōreki]] 10th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1760|1760]] [[:en:November 30|November 30]] ） – [[:en:Hanaoka Seishū|Kawaoka Seishū]] , a physician and pioneer of anesthesia († [[:en:1835|1835]] ). * [[:en:Bunka|Bunka]] 14th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1817|1817]] [[:en:December 1|December 1]] ） – {{ill|Ono Yūgorō|ja|小野友五郎|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ono Yūgorō|1=Ono Tomogorō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q6463981}} , a mathematician († [[:en:1898|1898]] ). * [[:en:Kaei|Kaei]] 2nd year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1849|1849]] [[:en:December 7|December 7]] ） – [[:en:Saionji Kinmochi|Saionji Kinmochi]] , who served as Prime Minister on two occasions and as genrō († [[:en:1940|1940]] ). * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 4th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1871|1871]] [[:en:December 5|December 5]] ） – {{ill|Doi Bansui|ja|土井晩翠|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Doi Bansui|1=Bansui Doi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1234919}} , a poet († [[:en:1952|1952]] ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Tenshōjingo|ja|Tenpyō神護|1=Tenpyō-jingo|2=ja|3=天平神護|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenshōjingo|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1373181}} 1st year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:765|765]] [[:en:November 10|November 10]] ） – Emperor [[:en:Emperor Junnin|Junnin]] , the 47th emperor. * [[:en:Kanbun (era)|Kanbun]] 9th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1669|1669]] [[:en:November 16|November 16]] ） – {{ill|Shakusha In|ja|シャクシャイン|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shakusha In|comment=changed title based on wikidata|1=Shakushain|WD=Q3280296}} , the Ainu chief. * {{ill|Taihei Kōkoku|ja|太平興国|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taihei Kōkoku|1=Taipingxinguo|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10941278}} 1st year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:976|976]] [[:en:November 14|November 14]] ） – Emperor [[:en:Emperor Taizu of Song|Zhao Kuangyin]] (Taizu), the first emperor of the Northern Song (* [[:en:927|927]] ). * {{ill|Daiji (Japan)|ja|大治|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Daiji (Japan)|1=Daiji (Japan)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10936305}} 2nd year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1127|1127]] [[:en:November 25|November 25]] ） – [[:en:Minamoto no Yoshimitsu|Minamoto no Yoshimitsu]] , a military commander and younger brother of [[:en:Minamoto no Yoshiie|Minamoto no Yoshiie]] (* [[:en:1045|1045]] ). * [[:en:Eikyō|Eikyō]] 5th year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1433|1433]] [[:en:December 1|December 1]] ） – Emperor [[:en:Emperor Go-Komatsu|Go-Komatsu]] , the 100th emperor of the Northern Court (* [[:en:1377|1377]] ). * [[:en:Ansei|Ansei]] 3rd year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1856|1856]] [[:en:November 17|November 17]] ） – [[:en:Ninomiya Sontoku|Ninomiya Sontoku]] , an agrarian reformer (* [[:en:1787|1787]] ).

== Deaths == * {{ill|Tenshōjingo|ja|Tenpyō神護|1=Tenpyō-jingo|2=ja|3=天平神護|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenshōjingo|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1373181}} 1st year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:765|765]] [[:en:November 10|November 10]] ） – Emperor [[:en:Emperor Junnin|Junnin]] , the 47th emperor. * [[:en:Kanbun (era)|Kanbun]] 9th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1669|1669]] [[:en:November 16|November 16]] ） – {{ill|Shakusha In|ja|シャクシャイン|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shakusha In|comment=changed title based on wikidata|1=Shakushain|WD=Q3280296}} , the Ainu chief. * {{ill|Taihei Kōkoku|ja|太平興国|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taihei Kōkoku|1=Taipingxinguo|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10941278}} 1st year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:976|976]] [[:en:November 14|November 14]] ） – Emperor [[:en:Emperor Taizu of Song|Zhao Kuangyin]] (Taizu), the first emperor of the Northern Song (* [[:en:927|927]] ). * {{ill|Daiji (Japan)|ja|大治|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Daiji (Japan)|1=Daiji (Japan)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10936305}} 2nd year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1127|1127]] [[:en:November 25|November 25]] ） – [[:en:Minamoto no Yoshimitsu|Minamoto no Yoshimitsu]] , a military commander and younger brother of [[:en:Minamoto no Yoshiie|Minamoto no Yoshiie]] (* [[:en:1045|1045]] ). * [[:en:Eikyō|Eikyō]] 5th year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1433|1433]] [[:en:December 1|December 1]] ） – Emperor [[:en:Emperor Go-Komatsu|Go-Komatsu]] , the 100th emperor of the Northern Court (* [[:en:1377|1377]] ). * [[:en:Ansei|Ansei]] 3rd year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1856|1856]] [[:en:November 17|November 17]] ） – [[:en:Ninomiya Sontoku|Ninomiya Sontoku]] , an agrarian reformer (* [[:en:1787|1787]] ).

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:9 nguŏk 23 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:9月23日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 9월 23일]][[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 23 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:九月廿三]][[zh:九月廿三]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q840365]] Wikidata name: 23rd day of the 9th month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 09:13, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|September 23|qq=September 23}}[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]]<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=九月廿三|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 9월 23일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar September|qq=}} '''September 23''' is the 23rd day of month {{ill|September (Lunisolar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September (Nagatsuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/September (Lunisolar)|qq=}} the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Senshū|WD=Q96759839}}{{efn|ja|先勝|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senshō|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}} .
== Events == * [[:en:Wadō (era)|Wadō]] 5th year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:712|712]] [[:en:October 27|October 27]] ） – The region of Echigo split the Dewa district off into a separate Dewa Province. * [[:en:Jōji|Teiji]] 1st year/[[:en:Zhengping|Shōhei]] 17th year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1362|1362]] [[:en:October 11|October 11]] ） – The Northern Court changed its era name from [[:en:Kōan (Muromachi period)|Kang'an]] to [[:en:Jōji|Teiji]] . * [[Kansei]]{{efn|January 1789 through February 1801|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kansei|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 12nd year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1800|1800]] [[:en:December 7|December 7]] ） – Inō Tadataka completed his survey of Ezo and the Ōshū Kaidō, then returned to Edo and presented his preliminary map to the shogunate. * [[:en:Ansei|Ansei]] 4th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1857|1857]] [[:en:December 7|December 7]] ） – U.S. Consul [[:en:Harris|Townsend Harris]] visited Edo Castle and met with Tokugawa Iesada. == Births == * {{ill|Genroku|1=Genroku|2=ja|3=元禄|WD=Q1325001|ja|Genroku|1=Genroku|2=ja|3=元禄|WD=Q1325001|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Genroku|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1325001}} 15th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1702|1702]] [[:en:October 24|October 24]] ） – [[:en:Yokoi Yayū|Yokoi Yayuu]] , a haiku poet († [[:en:1783|1783]] ). * [[:en:Hōreki|Hōreki]] 10th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1760|1760]] [[:en:November 30|November 30]] ） – [[:en:Hanaoka Seishū|Kawaoka Seishū]] , a physician and pioneer of anesthesia († [[:en:1835|1835]] ). * [[:en:Bunka|Bunka]] 14th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1817|1817]] [[:en:December 1|December 1]] ） – {{ill|Ono Yūgorō|ja|小野友五郎|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ono Yūgorō|1=Ono Tomogorō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q6463981}} , a mathematician († [[:en:1898|1898]] ). * [[:en:Kaei|Kaei]] 2nd year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1849|1849]] [[:en:December 7|December 7]] ） – [[:en:Saionji Kinmochi|Saionji Kinmochi]] , who served as Prime Minister on two occasions and as genrō († [[:en:1940|1940]] ). * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 4th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1871|1871]] [[:en:December 5|December 5]] ） – {{ill|Doi Bansui|ja|土井晩翠|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Doi Bansui|1=Bansui Doi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1234919}} , a poet († [[:en:1952|1952]] ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Tenshōjingo|ja|Tenpyō神護|1=Tenpyō-jingo|2=ja|3=天平神護|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenshōjingo|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1373181}} 1st year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:765|765]] [[:en:November 10|November 10]] ） – Emperor [[:en:Emperor Junnin|Junnin]] , the 47th emperor. * [[:en:Kanbun (era)|Kanbun]] 9th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1669|1669]] [[:en:November 16|November 16]] ） – {{ill|Shakusha In|ja|シャクシャイン|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shakusha In|comment=changed title based on wikidata|1=Shakushain|WD=Q3280296}} , the Ainu chief. * {{ill|Taihei Kōkoku|ja|太平興国|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taihei Kōkoku|1=Taipingxinguo|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10941278}} 1st year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:976|976]] [[:en:November 14|November 14]] ） – Emperor [[:en:Emperor Taizu of Song|Zhao Kuangyin]] (Taizu), the first emperor of the Northern Song (* [[:en:927|927]] ). * {{ill|Daiji (Japan)|ja|大治|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Daiji (Japan)|1=Daiji (Japan)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10936305}} 2nd year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1127|1127]] [[:en:November 25|November 25]] ） – [[:en:Minamoto no Yoshimitsu|Minamoto no Yoshimitsu]] , a military commander and younger brother of [[:en:Minamoto no Yoshiie|Minamoto no Yoshiie]] (* [[:en:1045|1045]] ). * [[:en:Eikyō|Eikyō]] 5th year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1433|1433]] [[:en:December 1|December 1]] ） – Emperor [[:en:Emperor Go-Komatsu|Go-Komatsu]] , the 100th emperor of the Northern Court (* [[:en:1377|1377]] ). * [[:en:Ansei|Ansei]] 3rd year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1856|1856]] [[:en:November 17|November 17]] ） – [[:en:Ninomiya Sontoku|Ninomiya Sontoku]] , an agrarian reformer (* [[:en:1787|1787]] ).

Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=九月廿三|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 9월 23일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar September|qq=}} '''September 23''' is the 23rd day of month {{ill|September (Lunisolar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September (Nagatsuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/September (Lunisolar)|qq=}} the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Senshū|WD=Q96759839}}{{efn|ja|先勝|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senshō|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}} .
== Events == * [[:en:Wadō (era)|Wadō]] 5th year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:712|712]] [[:en:October 27|October 27]] ） – The region of Echigo split the Dewa district off into a separate Dewa Province. * [[:en:Jōji|Teiji]] 1st year/[[:en:Zhengping|Shōhei]] 17th year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1362|1362]] [[:en:October 11|October 11]] ） – The Northern Court changed its era name from [[:en:Kōan (Muromachi period)|Kang'an]] to [[:en:Jōji|Teiji]] . * [[Kansei]]{{efn|January 1789 through February 1801|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kansei|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 12nd year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1800|1800]] [[:en:December 7|December 7]] ） – Inō Tadataka completed his survey of Ezo and the Ōshū Kaidō, then returned to Edo and presented his preliminary map to the shogunate. * [[:en:Ansei|Ansei]] 4th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1857|1857]] [[:en:December 7|December 7]] ） – U.S. Consul [[:en:Harris|Townsend Harris]] visited Edo Castle and met with Tokugawa Iesada. == Births == * {{ill|Genroku|1=Genroku|2=ja|3=元禄|WD=Q1325001|ja|Genroku|1=Genroku|2=ja|3=元禄|WD=Q1325001|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Genroku|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1325001}} 15th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1702|1702]] [[:en:October 24|October 24]] ） – [[:en:Yokoi Yayū|Yokoi Yayuu]] , a haiku poet († [[:en:1783|1783]] ). * [[:en:Hōreki|Hōreki]] 10th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1760|1760]] [[:en:November 30|November 30]] ） – [[:en:Hanaoka Seishū|Kawaoka Seishū]] , a physician and pioneer of anesthesia († [[:en:1835|1835]] ). * [[:en:Bunka|Bunka]] 14th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1817|1817]] [[:en:December 1|December 1]] ） – {{ill|Ono Yūgorō|ja|小野友五郎|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ono Yūgorō|1=Ono Tomogorō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q6463981}} , a mathematician († [[:en:1898|1898]] ). * [[:en:Kaei|Kaei]] 2nd year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1849|1849]] [[:en:December 7|December 7]] ） – [[:en:Saionji Kinmochi|Saionji Kinmochi]] , who served as Prime Minister on two occasions and as genrō († [[:en:1940|1940]] ). * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 4th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1871|1871]] [[:en:December 5|December 5]] ） – {{ill|Doi Bansui|ja|土井晩翠|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Doi Bansui|1=Bansui Doi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1234919}} , a poet († [[:en:1952|1952]] ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Tenshōjingo|ja|Tenpyō神護|1=Tenpyō-jingo|2=ja|3=天平神護|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenshōjingo|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1373181}} 1st year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:765|765]] [[:en:November 10|November 10]] ） – Emperor [[:en:Emperor Junnin|Junnin]] , the 47th emperor. * [[:en:Kanbun (era)|Kanbun]] 9th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1669|1669]] [[:en:November 16|November 16]] ） – {{ill|Shakusha In|ja|シャクシャイン|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shakusha In|comment=changed title based on wikidata|1=Shakushain|WD=Q3280296}} , the Ainu chief. * {{ill|Taihei Kōkoku|ja|太平興国|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taihei Kōkoku|1=Taipingxinguo|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10941278}} 1st year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:976|976]] [[:en:November 14|November 14]] ） – Emperor [[:en:Emperor Taizu of Song|Zhao Kuangyin]] (Taizu), the first emperor of the Northern Song (* [[:en:927|927]] ). * {{ill|Daiji (Japan)|ja|大治|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Daiji (Japan)|1=Daiji (Japan)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10936305}} 2nd year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1127|1127]] [[:en:November 25|November 25]] ） – [[:en:Minamoto no Yoshimitsu|Minamoto no Yoshimitsu]] , a military commander and younger brother of [[:en:Minamoto no Yoshiie|Minamoto no Yoshiie]] (* [[:en:1045|1045]] ). * [[:en:Eikyō|Eikyō]] 5th year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1433|1433]] [[:en:December 1|December 1]] ） – Emperor [[:en:Emperor Go-Komatsu|Go-Komatsu]] , the 100th emperor of the Northern Court (* [[:en:1377|1377]] ). * [[:en:Ansei|Ansei]] 3rd year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1856|1856]] [[:en:November 17|November 17]] ） – [[:en:Ninomiya Sontoku|Ninomiya Sontoku]] , an agrarian reformer (* [[:en:1787|1787]] ).

== Events == * [[:en:Wadō (era)|Wadō]] 5th year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:712|712]] [[:en:October 27|October 27]] ） – The region of Echigo split the Dewa district off into a separate Dewa Province. * [[:en:Jōji|Teiji]] 1st year/[[:en:Zhengping|Shōhei]] 17th year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1362|1362]] [[:en:October 11|October 11]] ） – The Northern Court changed its era name from [[:en:Kōan (Muromachi period)|Kang'an]] to [[:en:Jōji|Teiji]] . * [[Kansei]]{{efn|January 1789 through February 1801|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kansei|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 12nd year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1800|1800]] [[:en:December 7|December 7]] ） – Inō Tadataka completed his survey of Ezo and the Ōshū Kaidō, then returned to Edo and presented his preliminary map to the shogunate. * [[:en:Ansei|Ansei]] 4th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1857|1857]] [[:en:December 7|December 7]] ） – U.S. Consul [[:en:Harris|Townsend Harris]] visited Edo Castle and met with Tokugawa Iesada. == Births == * It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Senshū|WD=Q96759839}}{{efn|ja|先勝|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senshō|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}} .
== Events == * [[:en:Wadō (era)|Wadō]] 5th year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:712|712]] [[:en:October 27|October 27]] ） – The region of Echigo split the Dewa district off into a separate Dewa Province. * [[:en:Jōji|Teiji]] 1st year/[[:en:Zhengping|Shōhei]] 17th year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1362|1362]] [[:en:October 11|October 11]] ） – The Northern Court changed its era name from [[:en:Kōan (Muromachi period)|Kang'an]] to [[:en:Jōji|Teiji]] . * [[Kansei]]{{efn|January 1789 through February 1801|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kansei|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 12nd year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1800|1800]] [[:en:December 7|December 7]] ） – Inō Tadataka completed his survey of Ezo and the Ōshū Kaidō, then returned to Edo and presented his preliminary map to the shogunate. * [[:en:Ansei|Ansei]] 4th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1857|1857]] [[:en:December 7|December 7]] ） – U.S. Consul [[:en:Harris|Townsend Harris]] visited Edo Castle and met with Tokugawa Iesada. == Births == * {{ill|Genroku|1=Genroku|2=ja|3=元禄|WD=Q1325001|ja|Genroku|1=Genroku|2=ja|3=元禄|WD=Q1325001|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Genroku|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1325001}} 15th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1702|1702]] [[:en:October 24|October 24]] ） – [[:en:Yokoi Yayū|Yokoi Yayuu]] , a haiku poet († [[:en:1783|1783]] ). * [[:en:Hōreki|Hōreki]] 10th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1760|1760]] [[:en:November 30|November 30]] ） – [[:en:Hanaoka Seishū|Kawaoka Seishū]] , a physician and pioneer of anesthesia († [[:en:1835|1835]] ). * [[:en:Bunka|Bunka]] 14th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1817|1817]] [[:en:December 1|December 1]] ） – {{ill|Ono Yūgorō|ja|小野友五郎|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ono Yūgorō|1=Ono Tomogorō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q6463981}} , a mathematician († [[:en:1898|1898]] ). * [[:en:Kaei|Kaei]] 2nd year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1849|1849]] [[:en:December 7|December 7]] ） – [[:en:Saionji Kinmochi|Saionji Kinmochi]] , who served as Prime Minister on two occasions and as genrō († [[:en:1940|1940]] ). * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 4th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1871|1871]] [[:en:December 5|December 5]] ） – {{ill|Doi Bansui|ja|土井晩翠|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Doi Bansui|1=Bansui Doi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1234919}} , a poet († [[:en:1952|1952]] ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Tenshōjingo|ja|Tenpyō神護|1=Tenpyō-jingo|2=ja|3=天平神護|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenshōjingo|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1373181}} 1st year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:765|765]] [[:en:November 10|November 10]] ） – Emperor [[:en:Emperor Junnin|Junnin]] , the 47th emperor. * [[:en:Kanbun (era)|Kanbun]] 9th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1669|1669]] [[:en:November 16|November 16]] ） – {{ill|Shakusha In|ja|シャクシャイン|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shakusha In|comment=changed title based on wikidata|1=Shakushain|WD=Q3280296}} , the Ainu chief. * {{ill|Taihei Kōkoku|ja|太平興国|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taihei Kōkoku|1=Taipingxinguo|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10941278}} 1st year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:976|976]] [[:en:November 14|November 14]] ） – Emperor [[:en:Emperor Taizu of Song|Zhao Kuangyin]] (Taizu), the first emperor of the Northern Song (* [[:en:927|927]] ). * {{ill|Daiji (Japan)|ja|大治|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Daiji (Japan)|1=Daiji (Japan)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10936305}} 2nd year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1127|1127]] [[:en:November 25|November 25]] ） – [[:en:Minamoto no Yoshimitsu|Minamoto no Yoshimitsu]] , a military commander and younger brother of [[:en:Minamoto no Yoshiie|Minamoto no Yoshiie]] (* [[:en:1045|1045]] ). * [[:en:Eikyō|Eikyō]] 5th year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1433|1433]] [[:en:December 1|December 1]] ） – Emperor [[:en:Emperor Go-Komatsu|Go-Komatsu]] , the 100th emperor of the Northern Court (* [[:en:1377|1377]] ). * [[:en:Ansei|Ansei]] 3rd year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1856|1856]] [[:en:November 17|November 17]] ） – [[:en:Ninomiya Sontoku|Ninomiya Sontoku]] , an agrarian reformer (* [[:en:1787|1787]] ).

Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=九月廿三|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 9월 23일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar September|qq=}} '''September 23''' is the 23rd day of month {{ill|September (Lunisolar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September (Nagatsuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/September (Lunisolar)|qq=}} the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Senshū|WD=Q96759839}}{{efn|ja|先勝|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senshō|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}} .
== Events == * [[:en:Wadō (era)|Wadō]] 5th year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:712|712]] [[:en:October 27|October 27]] ） – The region of Echigo split the Dewa district off into a separate Dewa Province. * [[:en:Jōji|Teiji]] 1st year/[[:en:Zhengping|Shōhei]] 17th year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1362|1362]] [[:en:October 11|October 11]] ） – The Northern Court changed its era name from [[:en:Kōan (Muromachi period)|Kang'an]] to [[:en:Jōji|Teiji]] . * [[Kansei]]{{efn|January 1789 through February 1801|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kansei|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 12nd year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1800|1800]] [[:en:December 7|December 7]] ） – Inō Tadataka completed his survey of Ezo and the Ōshū Kaidō, then returned to Edo and presented his preliminary map to the shogunate. * [[:en:Ansei|Ansei]] 4th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1857|1857]] [[:en:December 7|December 7]] ） – U.S. Consul [[:en:Harris|Townsend Harris]] visited Edo Castle and met with Tokugawa Iesada. == Births == * {{ill|Genroku|1=Genroku|2=ja|3=元禄|WD=Q1325001|ja|Genroku|1=Genroku|2=ja|3=元禄|WD=Q1325001|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Genroku|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1325001}} 15th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1702|1702]] [[:en:October 24|October 24]] ） – [[:en:Yokoi Yayū|Yokoi Yayuu]] , a haiku poet († [[:en:1783|1783]] ). * [[:en:Hōreki|Hōreki]] 10th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1760|1760]] [[:en:November 30|November 30]] ） – [[:en:Hanaoka Seishū|Kawaoka Seishū]] , a physician and pioneer of anesthesia († [[:en:1835|1835]] ). * [[:en:Bunka|Bunka]] 14th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1817|1817]] [[:en:December 1|December 1]] ） – {{ill|Ono Yūgorō|ja|小野友五郎|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ono Yūgorō|1=Ono Tomogorō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q6463981}} , a mathematician († [[:en:1898|1898]] ). * [[:en:Kaei|Kaei]] 2nd year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1849|1849]] [[:en:December 7|December 7]] ） – [[:en:Saionji Kinmochi|Saionji Kinmochi]] , who served as Prime Minister on two occasions and as genrō († [[:en:1940|1940]] ). * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 4th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1871|1871]] [[:en:December 5|December 5]] ） – {{ill|Doi Bansui|ja|土井晩翠|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Doi Bansui|1=Bansui Doi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1234919}} , a poet († [[:en:1952|1952]] ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Tenshōjingo|ja|Tenpyō神護|1=Tenpyō-jingo|2=ja|3=天平神護|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenshōjingo|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1373181}} 1st year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:765|765]] [[:en:November 10|November 10]] ） – Emperor [[:en:Emperor Junnin|Junnin]] , the 47th emperor. * [[:en:Kanbun (era)|Kanbun]] 9th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1669|1669]] [[:en:November 16|November 16]] ） – {{ill|Shakusha In|ja|シャクシャイン|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shakusha In|comment=changed title based on wikidata|1=Shakushain|WD=Q3280296}} , the Ainu chief. * {{ill|Taihei Kōkoku|ja|太平興国|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taihei Kōkoku|1=Taipingxinguo|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10941278}} 1st year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:976|976]] [[:en:November 14|November 14]] ） – Emperor [[:en:Emperor Taizu of Song|Zhao Kuangyin]] (Taizu), the first emperor of the Northern Song (* [[:en:927|927]] ). * {{ill|Daiji (Japan)|ja|大治|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Daiji (Japan)|1=Daiji (Japan)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10936305}} 2nd year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1127|1127]] [[:en:November 25|November 25]] ） – [[:en:Minamoto no Yoshimitsu|Minamoto no Yoshimitsu]] , a military commander and younger brother of [[:en:Minamoto no Yoshiie|Minamoto no Yoshiie]] (* [[:en:1045|1045]] ). * [[:en:Eikyō|Eikyō]] 5th year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1433|1433]] [[:en:December 1|December 1]] ） – Emperor [[:en:Emperor Go-Komatsu|Go-Komatsu]] , the 100th emperor of the Northern Court (* [[:en:1377|1377]] ). * [[:en:Ansei|Ansei]] 3rd year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1856|1856]] [[:en:November 17|November 17]] ） – [[:en:Ninomiya Sontoku|Ninomiya Sontoku]] , an agrarian reformer (* [[:en:1787|1787]] ).

It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Senshū|WD=Q96759839}}{{efn|ja|先勝|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senshō|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Wadō (era)|en|Wadō (era)|WD=Q1373026|lt=Wadō}} 5th year（{{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|712|en|712|WD=Q23521|lt=712}} {{ill|October 27|en|October 27|WD=Q2956|lt=October 27}} ） – The region of Echigo split the Dewa district off into a separate Dewa Province. * {{ill|Jōji|en|Jōji|WD=Q1146153|lt=Teiji}} 1st year/{{ill|Zhengping|en|Zhengping|WD=Q11123413|lt=Shōhei}} 17th year（{{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1362|en|1362|WD=Q6166|lt=1362}} {{ill|October 11|en|October 11|WD=Q2927|lt=October 11}} ） – The Northern Court changed its era name from {{ill|Kōan (Muromachi period)|en|Kōan (Muromachi period)|WD=Q515424|lt=Kang'an}} to {{ill|Jōji|en|Jōji|WD=Q1146153|lt=Teiji}} . * [[Kansei]]{{efn|January 1789 through February 1801|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kansei|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 12nd year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1800|en|1800|WD=Q6875|lt=1800}} {{ill|December 7|en|December 7|WD=Q2299|lt=December 7}} ） – Inō Tadataka completed his survey of Ezo and the Ōshū Kaidō, then returned to Edo and presented his preliminary map to the shogunate. * {{ill|Ansei|en|Ansei|WD=Q1327259|lt=Ansei}} 4th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1857|en|1857|WD=Q7680|lt=1857}} {{ill|December 7|en|December 7|WD=Q2299|lt=December 7}} ） – U.S. Consul {{ill|Harris|en|Harris|WD=Q226548|lt=Townsend Harris}} visited Edo Castle and met with Tokugawa Iesada. == Births == *
